tEn: End-to-End Training of Deep Visuomotor Policies
tZh: 深度视觉运动策略的端到端训练
sEn: Jointly training perception and control end-to-end yields better performance than separate training for visuomotor policies.
sZh: 联合训练感知和控制系统端到端比单独训练每个组件能获得更好的性能。
absEn: Policy search methods can allow robots to learn control policies for a wide range of tasks, but practical applications of policy search often require hand-engineered components for perception, state estimation, and low-level control. In this paper, we aim to answer the following question: does training the perception and control systems jointly end-to-end provide better performance than training each component separately? To this end, we develop a method that can be used to learn policies that map raw image observations directly to torques at the robot's motors. The policies are represented by deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with 92,000 parameters, and are trained using a partially observed guided policy search method, which transforms policy search into supervised learning, with supervision provided by a simple trajectory-centric reinforcement learning method. We evaluate our method on a range of real-world manipulation tasks that require close coordination between vision and control, such as screwing a cap onto a bottle, and present simulated comparisons to a range of prior policy search methods.
absZh: 策略搜索方法可以让机器人学习各种任务的操控策略，但实际应用中往往需要手工设计的感知、状态估计和底层控制组件。本文旨在回答以下问题：联合训练感知和控制系统端到端是否比单独训练每个组件能获得更好的性能？为此，我们开发了一种方法，可以学习将原始图像观测直接映射到机器人电机扭矩的策略。这些策略由具有92,000个参数的深度卷积神经网络表示，并使用部分观测的引导策略搜索方法进行训练，该方法将策略搜索转化为监督学习，监督信号由简单的以轨迹为中心的强化学习方法提供。我们在需要视觉和操控紧密协调的一系列真实世界操作任务（如将瓶盖拧到瓶子上）上评估了我们的方法，并与多种先前的策略搜索方法进行了模拟比较。

contrib.en: Develops a guided policy search method that transforms policy search into supervised learning using trajectory-centric RL.
contrib.zh: 提出一种引导式策略搜索方法，将策略搜索转化为监督学习，利用轨迹中心强化学习提供监督信号。

contrib.en: Introduces a novel CNN architecture with spatial soft-argmax for end-to-end visuomotor policy learning from raw images to torques.
contrib.zh: 引入一种新颖的CNN架构，包含空间软argmax层，实现从原始图像到力矩的端到端视觉运动策略学习。

contrib.en: Demonstrates end-to-end training of perception and control outperforms separate training on real-world manipulation tasks.
contrib.zh: 在真实世界操作任务上证明，感知与控制联合端到端训练优于分别训练。

contrib.en: Achieves sample-efficient learning with only tens of minutes of real-world interaction time for complex 7-DoF tasks.
contrib.zh: 实现样本高效学习，仅需数十分钟真实交互即可完成复杂7自由度任务。

contrib.en: Provides simulated comparisons showing guided policy search outperforms prior methods like REPS, RWR, and PILCO.
contrib.zh: 通过仿真对比表明，引导式策略搜索优于REPS、RWR和PILCO等先前方法。

contrib.en: Formalizes guided policy search as BADMM, ensuring convergence to a locally optimal solution.
contrib.zh: 将引导式策略搜索形式化为BADMM算法，确保收敛到局部最优解。

limits.en: Requires full state observability during training, limiting applicability to instrumented setups.
limits.zh: 训练时需要完全状态可观测，限制了在非仪器化场景中的应用。

limits.en: Assumes low-noise dynamics for linear-Gaussian trajectory optimization, which may not hold in highly stochastic environments.
limits.zh: 假设低噪声动力学以进行线性高斯轨迹优化，在高度随机环境中可能不成立。

limits.en: Uses first-moment constraints on actions, which may be insufficient for tasks requiring precise higher-order statistics.
limits.zh: 对动作采用一阶矩约束，可能不足以处理需要高阶统计量的任务。

limits.en: Pretraining requires ImageNet initialization and pose regression data, adding dependency on external datasets.
limits.zh: 预训练需要ImageNet初始化和位姿回归数据，增加了对外部数据集的依赖。

limits.en: Policy architecture with spatial soft-argmax is specialized for visuomotor tasks and may not generalize to other perception problems.
limits.zh: 带有空间软argmax的策略架构专用于视觉运动任务，可能无法泛化到其他感知问题。

items.en: Policy search methods can allow robots to learn control policies for a wide range of tasks, but practical applications of policy search often require hand-engineered components for perception, state estimation, and low-level control. In this paper, we aim to answer the following question: does training the perception and control systems jointly end-to-end provide better performance than training each component separately? To this end, we develop a method that can be used to learn policies that map raw image observations directly to torques at the robot’s motors. The policies are represented by deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with 92,000 parameters, and are trained using a guided policy search method, which transforms policy search into supervised learning, with supervision provided by a simple trajectory-centric reinforcement learning method. We evaluate our method on a range of real-world manipulation tasks that require close coordination between vision and control, such as screwing a cap onto a bottle, and present simulated comparisons to a range of prior policy search methods.
items.zh: 策略搜索方法可以让机器人学习各种任务的控制策略，但实际应用中的策略搜索通常需要手工设计的感知、状态估计和底层控制组件。本文旨在回答以下问题：联合端到端训练感知和控制系统是否比单独训练每个组件能带来更好的性能？为此，我们开发了一种方法，用于学习将原始图像观测直接映射到机器人电机扭矩的策略。这些策略由具有92,000个参数的深度卷积神经网络（CNN）表示，并使用引导策略搜索方法进行训练，该方法将策略搜索转化为监督学习，监督信号由简单的以轨迹为中心的强化学习方法提供。我们在多种需要视觉与控制紧密协调的真实世界操作任务上评估了我们的方法，例如将瓶盖拧到瓶子上，并与一系列先前的策略搜索方法进行了模拟比较。

items.en: Keywords: Reinforcement Learning, Optimal Control, Vision, Neural Networks
items.zh: 关键词：强化学习，最优控制，视觉，神经网络

items.en: Robots can perform impressive tasks under human control, including surgery (Lanfranco et al., 2004) and household chores (Wyrobek et al., 2008). However, designing the perception and control software for autonomous operation remains a major challenge, even for basic tasks. Policy search methods hold the promise of allowing robots to automatically learn new behaviors through experience (Kober et al., 2010b; Deisenroth et al., 2011; Kalakrishnan et al., 2011; Deisenroth et al., 2013). However, policies learned using such methods often rely on a number of hand-engineered components for perception and control, so as to present the policy with a more manageable and low-dimensional representation of observations and actions. The vision system in particular can be complex and prone to errors, and it is typically not improved during policy training, nor adapted to the goal of the task.
items.zh: 机器人可以在人类控制下执行令人印象深刻的任务，包括手术（Lanfranco等人，2004）和家务（Wyrobek等人，2008）。然而，为自主操作设计感知和控制软件仍然是一个重大挑战，即使是基本任务也是如此。策略搜索方法有望让机器人通过经验自动学习新行为（Kober等人，2010b；Deisenroth等人，2011；Kalakrishnan等人，2011；Deisenroth等人，2013）。然而，使用此类方法学习的策略通常依赖于许多手工设计的感知和控制组件，以便为策略提供更易处理且低维的观测和动作表示。特别是视觉系统可能复杂且容易出错，并且在策略训练期间通常不会得到改进，也不会适应任务目标。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Our method learns visuomotor policies that directly use camera image observations (left) to set motor torques on a PR2 robot (right).
items.capZh: 图1：我们的方法学习视觉运动策略，直接使用相机图像观测（左）来设置PR2机器人（右）上的电机扭矩。

items.en: In this article, we aim to answer the following question: can we acquire more effective policies for sensorimotor control if the perception system is trained jointly with the control policy, rather than separately? In order to represent a policy that performs both perception and control, we use deep neural networks. Deep neural network representations have recently seen widespread success in a variety of domains, such as computer vision and speech recognition, and even playing video games. However, using deep neural networks for real-world sensorimotor policies, such as robotic controllers that map image pixels and joint angles to motor torques, presents a number of unique challenges. Successful applications of deep neural networks typically rely on large amounts of data and direct supervision of the output, neither of which is available in robotic control. Real-world robot interaction data is scarce, and task completion is defined at a high level by means of a cost function, which means that the learning algorithm must determine on its own which action to take at each point. From the control perspective, a further complication is that observations from the robot’s sensors do not provide us with the full state of the system. Instead, important state information, such as the positions of task-relevant objects, must be inferred from inputs such as camera images.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们旨在回答以下问题：如果感知系统与控制策略联合训练，而不是单独训练，我们能否获得更有效的传感器运动控制策略？为了表示同时执行感知和控制的策略，我们使用深度神经网络。深度神经网络表示最近在计算机视觉、语音识别甚至玩视频游戏等多个领域取得了广泛成功。然而，将深度神经网络用于真实世界的传感器运动策略，例如将图像像素和关节角度映射到电机扭矩的机器人控制器，提出了许多独特的挑战。深度神经网络的成功应用通常依赖于大量数据和输出的直接监督，而这两者在机器人控制中都无法获得。真实世界的机器人交互数据稀缺，任务完成是通过成本函数在高层定义的，这意味着学习算法必须自行决定在每个时间点采取何种动作。从控制角度来看，另一个复杂因素是机器人传感器的观测并不能提供系统的完整状态。相反，重要的状态信息，例如任务相关物体的位置，必须从相机图像等输入中推断出来。

items.en: We address these challenges by developing a guided policy search algorithm for sensorimotor deep learning, as well as a novel CNN architecture designed for robotic control. Guided policy search converts policy search into supervised learning, by iteratively constructing the training data using an efficient model-free trajectory optimization procedure. We show that this can be formalized as an instance of Bregman ADMM (BADMM) (Wang and Banerjee, 2014), which can be used to show that the algorithm converges to a locally optimal solution. In our method, the full state of the system is observable at training time, but not at test time. For most tasks, providing the full state simply requires positioning objects in one of several known positions for each trial during training. At test time, the learned CNN policy can handle novel, unknown configurations, and no longer requires full state information. Since the policy is optimized with supervised learning, we can use standard methods like stochastic gradient descent for training. Our CNNs have 92,000 parameters and 7 layers, including a novel spatial feature point transformation that provides accurate spatial reasoning and reduces overfitting. This allows us to train our policies with relatively modest amounts of data and only tens of minutes of real-world interaction time.
items.zh: 我们通过开发一种用于传感器运动深度学习的引导策略搜索算法，以及一种专为机器人控制设计的新型CNN架构来应对这些挑战。引导策略搜索通过使用高效的无模型轨迹优化过程迭代地构建训练数据，将策略搜索转化为监督学习。我们证明这可以形式化为Bregman ADMM（BADMM）的一个实例（Wang和Banerjee，2014），该算法可以证明收敛到局部最优解。在我们的方法中，系统的完整状态在训练时可观测，但在测试时不可观测。对于大多数任务，提供完整状态只需在每次试验的训练期间将物体放置在几个已知位置之一。在测试时，学习到的CNN策略可以处理新颖的、未知的配置，并且不再需要完整状态信息。由于策略是通过监督学习优化的，我们可以使用标准方法（如随机梯度下降）进行训练。我们的CNN具有92,000个参数和7层，包括一个新颖的空间特征点变换，该变换提供了准确的空间推理并减少了过拟合。这使得我们能够用相对适中的数据量和仅几十分钟的真实世界交互时间来训练策略。

items.en: We evaluate our method by learning policies for inserting a block into a shape sorting cube, screwing a cap onto a bottle, fitting the claw of a toy hammer under a nail with various grasps, and placing a coat hanger on a rack with a PR2 robot (see Figure 1). These tasks require localization, visual tracking, and handling complex contact dynamics. Our results demonstrate improvements in consistency and generalization from training visuomotor policies end-to-end, when compared to training the vision and control components separately. We also present simulated comparisons that show that guided policy search outperforms a number of prior methods when training high-dimensional neural network policies. Some of the material in this article has previously appeared in two conference papers (Levine and Abbeel, 2014; Levine et al., 2015), which we extend to introduce visual input into the policy.
items.zh: 我们通过为以下任务学习策略来评估我们的方法：将积木插入形状分类立方体、将瓶盖拧到瓶子上、用各种抓取方式将玩具锤的爪子放在钉子下、以及用PR2机器人将衣架挂在架子上（见图1）。这些任务需要定位、视觉跟踪以及处理复杂的接触动力学。我们的结果表明，与单独训练视觉和控制组件相比，端到端训练视觉运动策略在一致性和泛化性方面有所改进。我们还提供了模拟比较，表明在训练高维神经网络策略时，引导策略搜索优于许多先前的方法。本文中的部分材料先前已出现在两篇会议论文中（Levine和Abbeel，2014；Levine等人，2015），我们在此扩展以将视觉输入引入策略。

items.en: Reinforcement learning and policy search methods (Gullapalli, 1990; Williams, 1992) have been applied in robotics for playing games such as table tennis (Kober et al., 2010b), object manipulation (Gullapalli, 1995; Peters and Schaal, 2008; Kober et al., 2010a; Deisenroth et al., 2011; Kalakrishnan et al., 2011), locomotion (Benbrahim and Franklin, 1997; Kohl and Stone, 2004; Tedrake et al., 2004; Geng et al., 2006; Endo et al., 2008), and flight (Ng et al., 2004). Several recent papers provide surveys of policy search in robotics (Deisenroth et al., 2013; Kober et al., 2013). Such methods are typically applied to one component of the robot control pipeline, which often sits on top of a hand-designed controller, such as a PD controller, and accepts processed input, for example from an existing vision pipeline (Kalakrishnan et al., 2011). Our method learns policies that map visual input and joint encoder readings directly to the torques at the robot’s joints. By learning the entire mapping from perception to control, the perception layers can be adapted to optimize task performance, and the motor control layers can be adapted to imperfect perception.
items.zh: 强化学习和策略搜索方法（Gullapalli，1990；Williams，1992）已应用于机器人领域，用于玩乒乓球（Kober等人，2010b）、物体操作（Gullapalli，1995；Peters和Schaal，2008；Kober等人，2010a；Deisenroth等人，2011；Kalakrishnan等人，2011）、运动（Benbrahim和Franklin，1997；Kohl和Stone，2004；Tedrake等人，2004；Geng等人，2006；Endo等人，2008）和飞行（Ng等人，2004）等游戏。最近的几篇论文提供了机器人策略搜索的综述（Deisenroth等人，2013；Kober等人，2013）。此类方法通常应用于机器人控制流水线的一个组件，该组件通常位于手工设计的控制器（如PD控制器）之上，并接受处理后的输入，例如来自现有视觉流水线的输入（Kalakrishnan等人，2011）。我们的方法学习将视觉输入和关节编码器读数直接映射到机器人关节扭矩的策略。通过学习从感知到控制的完整映射，感知层可以适应以优化任务性能，而电机控制层可以适应不完美的感知。

items.en: We represent our policies with convolutional neural networks (CNNs). CNNs have a long history in computer vision and deep learning (Fukushima, 1980; LeCun et al., 1989; Schmidhuber, 2015), and have recently gained prominence due to excellent results on a number of vision benchmarks (Ciresan et al., 2011; Krizhevsky et al., 2012; Ciresan et al., 2012; Girshick et al., 2014a; Tompson et al., 2014; LeCun et al., 2015; He et al., 2015). Most applications of CNNs focus on classification, where locational information is discarded by means of successive pooling layers to provide for invariance (Lee et al., 2009). Applications to localization typically either use a sliding window (Girshick et al., 2014a) or object proposals (Endres and Hoiem, 2010; Uijlings et al., 2013; Girshick et al., 2014b) to localize the object, reducing the task to classification, perform regression to a heatmap of manually labeled keypoints (Tompson et al., 2014), requiring precise knowledge of the object position in the image and camera calibration, or use 3D models to localize previously scanned objects (Pepik et al., 2012; Savarese and Fei-Fei, 2007). Many prior robotic applications of CNNs do not directly consider control, but employ CNNs for the perception component of a larger robotic system (Hadsell et al., 2009; Sung et al., 2015; Lenz et al., 2015b; Pinto and Gupta, 2015). We use a novel CNN architecture for our policies that automatically learn feature points that capture spatial information about the scene, without any supervision beyond the information from the robot’s encoders and camera.
items.zh: 我们使用卷积神经网络（CNN）表示我们的策略。CNN在计算机视觉和深度学习方面有着悠久的历史（Fukushima，1980；LeCun等人，1989；Schmidhuber，2015），并且最近由于在多个视觉基准测试中的出色结果而受到关注（Ciresan等人，2011；Krizhevsky等人，2012；Ciresan等人，2012；Girshick等人，2014a；Tompson等人，2014；LeCun等人，2015；He等人，2015）。CNN的大多数应用都集中在分类上，其中位置信息通过连续的池化层被丢弃以提供不变性（Lee等人，2009）。定位应用通常使用滑动窗口（Girshick等人，2014a）或物体提议（Endres和Hoiem，2010；Uijlings等人，2013；Girshick等人，2014b）来定位物体，将任务简化为分类，或对人工标记的关键点热图进行回归（Tompson等人，2014），这需要精确了解图像中的物体位置和相机标定，或使用3D模型来定位先前扫描过的物体（Pepik等人，2012；Savarese和Fei-Fei，2007）。许多先前CNN在机器人领域的应用并不直接考虑控制，而是将CNN用于更大机器人系统的感知组件（Hadsell等人，2009；Sung等人，2015；Lenz等人，2015b；Pinto和Gupta，2015）。我们为策略使用了一种新颖的CNN架构，该架构自动学习捕捉场景空间信息的特征点，除了来自机器人编码器和相机的信息外，无需任何监督。

items.en: Applications of deep learning in robotic control have been less prevalent in recent years than in visual recognition. Backpropagation through the dynamics and the image formation process is typically impractical, since they are often non-differentiable, and such long-range backpropagation can lead to extreme numerical instability, since the linearization of a suboptimal policy is likely to be unstable. This issue has also been observed in the related context of recurrent neural networks (Hochreiter et al., 2001; Pascanu and Bengio, 2012). The high dimensionality of the network also makes reinforcement learning difficult (Deisenroth et al., 2013). Pioneering early work on neural network control used small, simple networks (Pomerleau, 1989; Hunt et al., 1992; Bekey and Goldberg, 1992; Lewis et al., 1998; Bakker et al., 2003; Mayer et al., 2006), and has largely been supplanted by methods that use carefully designed policies that can be learned efficiently with reinforcement learning (Kober et al., 2013). More recent work on sensorimotor deep learning has tackled simple task-space motions (Lenz et al., 2015a; Lampe and Riedmiller, 2013) and used unsupervised learning to obtain low-dimensional state spaces from images (Lange et al., 2012). Such methods have been demonstrated on tasks with a low-dimensional underlying structure: Lenz et al. (2015a) controls the end-effector in 2D space, while Lange et al. (2012) controls a 2-dimensional slot car with 1-dimensional actions. Our experiments include full torque control of 7-DoF robotic arms interacting with objects, with 30-40 state dimensions. In simple synthetic environments, control from images has been addressed with image features (Jodogne and Piater, 2007), nonparametric methods (van Hoof et al., 2015), and unsupervised state-space learning (Böhmer et al., 2013; Jonschkowski and Brock, 2014). CNNs have also been trained to play video games with Q-learning, Monte Carlo tree search, and stochastic search (Mnih et al., 2013; Koutník et al., 2013; Guo et al., 2014), and have been applied to simple simulated control tasks (Watter et al., 2015; Lillicrap et al., 2015). However, such methods have only been demonstrated on synthetic domains that lack the visual complexity of the real world, and require an impractical number of samples for real-world robotic learning. Our method is sample efficient, requiring only minutes of interaction time. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first method that can train deep visuomotor policies for complex, high-dimensional manipulation skills with direct torque control.
items.zh: 近年来，深度学习在机器人控制中的应用不如在视觉识别中普遍。通过动力学和图像形成过程的反向传播通常不切实际，因为它们通常不可微，并且这种长程反向传播可能导致极端的数值不稳定性，因为次优策略的线性化很可能不稳定。这个问题在循环神经网络的相关背景下也被观察到（Hochreiter等人，2001；Pascanu和Bengio，2012）。网络的高维性也使得强化学习变得困难（Deisenroth等人，2013）。早期关于神经网络控制的先驱工作使用了小型、简单的网络（Pomerleau，1989；Hunt等人，1992；Bekey和Goldberg，1992；Lewis等人，1998；Bakker等人，2003；Mayer等人，2006），并且很大程度上已被使用精心设计的策略的方法所取代，这些策略可以通过强化学习高效学习（Kober等人，2013）。最近关于传感器运动深度学习的工作解决了简单的任务空间运动（Lenz等人，2015a；Lampe和Riedmiller，2013），并使用无监督学习从图像中获取低维状态空间（Lange等人，2012）。此类方法已在具有低维底层结构的任务上得到验证：Lenz等人（2015a）在二维空间中控制末端执行器，而Lange等人（2012）用一维动作控制二维槽车。我们的实验包括对与物体交互的7自由度机械臂进行全扭矩控制，具有30-40个状态维度。在简单的合成环境中，从图像进行控制已通过图像特征（Jodogne和Piater，2007）、非参数方法（van Hoof等人，2015）和无监督状态空间学习（Böhmer等人，2013；Jonschkowski和Brock，2014）得到解决。CNN也已通过Q学习、蒙特卡洛树搜索和随机搜索训练来玩视频游戏（Mnih等人，2013；Koutník等人，2013；Guo等人，2014），并已应用于简单的模拟控制任务（Watter等人，2015；Lillicrap等人，2015）。然而，此类方法仅在缺乏真实世界视觉复杂性的合成领域中得到验证，并且需要不切实际的样本数量用于真实世界的机器人学习。我们的方法样本效率高，仅需几分钟的交互时间。据我们所知，这是第一种能够为复杂、高维的操作技能训练深度视觉运动策略并实现直接扭矩控制的方法。

items.en: Learning visuomotor policies on a real robot requires handling complex observations and high dimensional policy representations. We tackle these challenges using guided policy search. In guided policy search, the policy is optimized using supervised learning, which scales gracefully with the dimensionality of the policy. The training set for supervised learning can be constructed using trajectory optimization under known dynamics (Levine and Koltun, 2013a, b, 2014; Mordatch and Todorov, 2014) and trajectory-centric reinforcement learning methods that operate under unknown dynamics (Levine and Abbeel, 2014; Levine et al., 2015), which is the approach taken in this work. In both cases, the supervision is adapted to the policy, to ensure that the final policy can reproduce the training data. The use of supervised learning in the inner loop of iterative policy search has also been proposed in the context of imitation learning (Ross et al., 2011, 2013). However, such methods typically do not address the question of how the supervision should be adapted to the policy.
items.zh: 在真实机器人上学习视觉运动策略需要处理复杂的观测和高维策略表示。我们使用引导策略搜索来应对这些挑战。在引导策略搜索中，策略通过监督学习进行优化，这可以优雅地扩展到策略的维度。监督学习的训练集可以通过已知动力学下的轨迹优化（Levine和Koltun，2013a, b, 2014；Mordatch和Todorov，2014）和在未知动力学下运行的以轨迹为中心的强化学习方法（Levine和Abbeel，2014；Levine等人，2015）来构建，本文采用后一种方法。在这两种情况下，监督信号都会适应策略，以确保最终策略能够复现训练数据。在迭代策略搜索的内循环中使用监督学习也已在模仿学习的背景下提出（Ross等人，2011，2013）。然而，此类方法通常不解决监督信号应如何适应策略的问题。

items.en: The goal of our approach is also similar to visual servoing, which performs feedback control on feature points in a camera image (Espiau et al., 1992; Mohta et al., 2014; Wilson et al., 1996). However, our visuomotor policies are entirely learned from real-world data, and do not require feature points or feedback controllers to be specified by hand. This allows our method much more flexibility in choosing how to use the visual signal. Our approach also does not require any sort of camera calibration, in contrast to many visual servoing methods (though not all – see e.g. Jägersand et al. (1997); Yoshimi and Allen (1994)).
items.zh: 我们方法的目标也类似于视觉伺服，后者对相机图像中的特征点进行反馈控制（Espiau等人，1992；Mohta等人，2014；Wilson等人，1996）。然而，我们的视觉运动策略完全从真实世界数据中学习，不需要手动指定特征点或反馈控制器。这使得我们的方法在选择如何使用视觉信号方面具有更大的灵活性。我们的方法也不需要任何形式的相机标定，这与许多视觉伺服方法形成对比（尽管并非全部——例如参见Jägersand等人（1997）；Yoshimi和Allen（1994））。

items.en: In this section, we define the visuomotor policy learning problem and present an overview of our approach. The core component of our approach is a guided policy search algorithm that separates the problem of learning visuomotor policies into separate supervised learning and trajectory learning phases, each of which is easier than optimizing the policy directly. We also discuss a policy architecture suitable for end-to-end learning of vision and control, and a training setup that allows our method to be applied to real robotic platforms.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们定义视觉运动策略学习问题，并概述我们的方法。我们方法的核心组件是一种引导策略搜索算法，该算法将视觉运动策略学习问题分解为独立的监督学习和轨迹学习阶段，每个阶段都比直接优化策略更容易。我们还讨论了一种适用于视觉和控制的端到端学习的策略架构，以及一种允许我们的方法应用于真实机器人平台的训练设置。

items.en: In policy search, the goal is to learn a policy πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}) that allows an agent to choose actions 𝐮tsubscript𝐮𝑡\mathbf{u}_{t} in response to observations 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t} to control a dynamical system, such as a robot. The policy comes from some parametric class parameterized by θ𝜃\theta, which could be, for example, the weights of a neural network. The system is defined by states 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t}, actions 𝐮tsubscript𝐮𝑡\mathbf{u}_{t}, and observations 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t}. For example, 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t} might include the joint angles of the robot, the positions of objects in the world, and their time derivatives, 𝐮tsubscript𝐮𝑡\mathbf{u}_{t} might consist of motor torque commands, and 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t} might include an image from the robot’s onboard camera. In this paper, we address finite horizon episodic tasks with t∈[1,…,T]𝑡1…𝑇t\in[1,\dots,T]. The states evolve in time according to the system dynamics p​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}), and the observations are, in general, a stochastic consequence of the states, according to p​(𝐨t|𝐱t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐨𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p(\mathbf{o}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}). Neither the dynamics nor the observation distribution are assumed to be known in general. For notational convenience, we will use πθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) to denote the distribution over actions under the policy conditioned on the state. However, since the policy is conditioned on the observation 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t}, this distribution is in fact given by πθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)=∫πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)​p​(𝐨t|𝐱t)​𝑑𝐨tsubscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐨𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡differential-dsubscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})=\int\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t})p(\mathbf{o}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})d\mathbf{o}_{t}. The dynamics and πθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) together induce a distribution over trajectories τ={𝐱1,𝐮1,𝐱2,𝐮2,…,𝐱T,𝐮T}𝜏subscript𝐱1subscript𝐮1subscript𝐱2subscript𝐮2…subscript𝐱𝑇subscript𝐮𝑇\tau=\{\mathbf{x}_{1},\mathbf{u}_{1},\mathbf{x}_{2},\mathbf{u}_{2},\dots,\mathbf{x}_{T},\mathbf{u}_{T}\}:
items.zh: 在策略搜索中，目标是学习一个策略πθ(𝐮t|𝐨t)，使智能体能够根据观测𝐨t选择动作𝐮t来控制动态系统，例如机器人。该策略来自某个由θ参数化的参数类，θ可以是神经网络的权重。系统由状态𝐱t、动作𝐮t和观测𝐨t定义。例如，𝐱t可能包括机器人的关节角度、世界中物体的位置及其时间导数，𝐮t可能包括电机扭矩指令，𝐨t可能包括机器人车载相机的图像。在本文中，我们处理有限时域情节任务，t∈[1,…,T]。状态根据系统动力学p(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)随时间演化，观测通常是状态的随机结果，根据p(𝐨t|𝐱t)。动力学和观测分布通常假设未知。为方便起见，我们将使用πθ(𝐮t|𝐱t)表示策略下以状态为条件的动作分布。然而，由于策略以观测𝐨t为条件，该分布实际上由πθ(𝐮t|𝐱t)=∫πθ(𝐮t|𝐨t)p(𝐨t|𝐱t)d𝐨t给出。动力学和πθ(𝐮t|𝐱t)共同诱导出轨迹τ={𝐱1,𝐮1,𝐱2,𝐮2,…,𝐱T,𝐮T}上的分布：

items.en: The goal of a task is given by a cost function ℓ​(𝐱t,𝐮t)ℓsubscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡\ell(\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}), and the objective in policy search is to minimize the expectation Eπθ​(τ)​[∑t=1Tℓ​(𝐱t,𝐮t)]subscript𝐸subscript𝜋𝜃𝜏delimited-[]superscriptsubscript𝑡1𝑇ℓsubscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡E_{\pi_{\theta}(\tau)}[\sum_{t=1}^{T}\ell(\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t})], which we will abbreviate as Eπθ​(τ)​[ℓ​(τ)]subscript𝐸subscript𝜋𝜃𝜏delimited-[]ℓ𝜏E_{\pi_{\theta}(\tau)}[\ell(\tau)]. A summary of the notation used in the paper is provided in Table 1.
items.zh: 任务的目标由成本函数ℓ(𝐱t,𝐮t)给出，策略搜索的目标是最小化期望Eπθ(τ)[∑t=1Tℓ(𝐱t,𝐮t)]，我们将其缩写为Eπθ(τ)[ℓ(τ)]。本文使用的符号总结见表1。

items.en: Our methods consists of two main components, which are illustrated in Figure 3. The first is a supervised learning algorithm that trains policies of the form πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)=𝒩​(μπ​(𝐨t),Σπ​(𝐨t))subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡𝒩superscript𝜇𝜋subscript𝐨𝑡superscriptΣ𝜋subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t})=\mathcal{N}(\mu^{\pi}(\mathbf{o}_{t}),\Sigma^{\pi}(\mathbf{o}_{t})), where both μπ​(𝐨t)superscript𝜇𝜋subscript𝐨𝑡\mu^{\pi}(\mathbf{o}_{t}) and Σπ​(𝐨t)superscriptΣ𝜋subscript𝐨𝑡\Sigma^{\pi}(\mathbf{o}_{t}) are general nonlinear functions. In our implementation, μπ​(𝐨t)superscript𝜇𝜋subscript𝐨𝑡\mu^{\pi}(\mathbf{o}_{t}) is a deep convolutional neural network, while Σπ​(𝐨t)superscriptΣ𝜋subscript𝐨𝑡\Sigma^{\pi}(\mathbf{o}_{t}) is an observation-independent learned covariance, though other representations are possible. The second component is a trajectory-centric reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm that generates guiding distributions pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) that provide the supervision used to train the policy. These two components form a policy search algorithm that can be used to learn complex robotic tasks using only a high-level cost function ℓ​(𝐱t,𝐮t)ℓsubscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡\ell(\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}). During training, only samples from the guiding distributions pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) are generated by running rollouts on the physical system, which avoids the need to execute partially trained neural network policies on physical hardware.
items.zh: 我们的方法包括两个主要组件，如图3所示。第一个是监督学习算法，用于训练形式为πθ(𝐮t|𝐨t)=𝒩(μπ(𝐨t),Σπ(𝐨t))的策略，其中μπ(𝐨t)和Σπ(𝐨t)都是通用的非线性函数。在我们的实现中，μπ(𝐨t)是一个深度卷积神经网络，而Σπ(𝐨t)是一个与观测无关的学习协方差，尽管其他表示也是可能的。第二个组件是以轨迹为中心的强化学习（RL）算法，用于生成引导分布pi(𝐮t|𝐱t)，这些分布提供用于训练策略的监督信号。这两个组件构成一个策略搜索算法，可用于仅使用高层成本函数ℓ(𝐱t,𝐮t)学习复杂的机器人任务。在训练期间，只有来自引导分布pi(𝐮t|𝐱t)的样本通过在物理系统上运行轨迹生成，这避免了在物理硬件上执行部分训练的神经网络策略的需要。

items.en: Supervised learning will not, in general, produce a policy with good long-horizon performance, since a small mistake on the part of the policy will place the system into states that are outside the distribution in the training data, causing compounding errors. To avoid this issue, the training data must come from the policy’s own state distribution (Ross et al., 2011). We achieve this by alternating between trajectory-centric RL and supervised learning. The RL stage adapts to the current policy πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}), providing supervision at states that are iteratively brought closer to the states visited by the policy. This is formalized as a variant of the BADMM algorithm (Wang and Banerjee, 2014) for constrained optimization, which can be used to show that, at convergence, the policy πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}) and the guiding distributions pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) will exhibit the same behavior. This algorithm is derived in Section 4. The guiding distributions are substantially easier to optimize than learning the policy parameters directly (e.g., using model-free reinforcement learning), because they use the full state of the system 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t}, while the policy πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}) only uses the observations. This means that the method requires the full state to be known during training, but not at test time. This makes it possible to efficiently learn complex visuomotor policies, but imposes additional assumptions on the observability of 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t} during training that we discuss in Section 4.
items.zh: 监督学习通常不会产生具有良好长时域性能的策略，因为策略的一个小错误会将系统置于训练数据分布之外的状态，导致复合误差。为了避免这个问题，训练数据必须来自策略自身的状态分布（Ross等人，2011）。我们通过在轨迹为中心的RL和监督学习之间交替来实现这一点。RL阶段适应当前的策略πθ(𝐮t|𝐨t)，在迭代地接近策略访问的状态上提供监督信号。这被形式化为用于约束优化的BADMM算法（Wang和Banerjee，2014）的一个变体，可以用来证明，在收敛时，策略πθ(𝐮t|𝐨t)和引导分布pi(𝐮t|𝐱t)将表现出相同的行为。该算法在第4节中推导。引导分布比直接学习策略参数（例如，使用无模型强化学习）更容易优化，因为它们使用系统的完整状态𝐱t，而策略πθ(𝐮t|𝐨t)仅使用观测。这意味着该方法在训练时需要知道完整状态，但在测试时不需要。这使得高效学习复杂的视觉运动策略成为可能，但对训练期间𝐱t的可观测性施加了额外的假设，我们在第4节中讨论。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Visuomotor policy architecture. The network contains three convolutional layers, followed by a spatial softmax and an expected position layer that converts pixel-wise features to feature points, which are better suited for spatial computations. The points are concatenated with the robot configuration, then passed through three fully connected layers to produce the torques.
items.capZh: 图2：视觉运动策略架构。该网络包含三个卷积层，随后是一个空间softmax和一个期望位置层，将逐像素特征转换为特征点，这些特征点更适合空间计算。这些点与机器人配置连接，然后通过三个全连接层产生扭矩。

items.en: When learning visuomotor tasks, the policy πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}) is represented by a novel convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture, which we describe in Section 5.2. CNNs have enjoyed considerable success in computer vision (LeCun et al., 2015), but the most popular architectures rely on large datasets and focus on semantic tasks such as classification, often intentionally discarding spatial information. Our architecture, illustrated in Figure 2, uses a fixed transformation from the last convolutional layer to a set of spatial feature points, which form a concise representation of the visual scene suitable for feedback control. Our network has 7 layers and around 92,000 parameters, which presents a major challenge for standard policy search methods (Deisenroth et al., 2013).
items.zh: 在学习视觉运动任务时，策略πθ(𝐮t|𝐨t)由一种新颖的卷积神经网络（CNN）架构表示，我们在第5.2节中描述。CNN在计算机视觉中取得了相当大的成功（LeCun等人，2015），但最流行的架构依赖于大型数据集，并专注于语义任务（如分类），通常有意丢弃空间信息。我们的架构如图2所示，使用从最后一个卷积层到一组空间特征点的固定变换，这些特征点形成了适合反馈控制的视觉场景的简洁表示。我们的网络有7层和大约92,000个参数，这对标准策略搜索方法构成了重大挑战（Deisenroth等人，2013）。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Diagram of our approach, including the main guided policy search phase and initialization phases.
items.capZh: 图3：我们方法的示意图，包括主要的引导策略搜索阶段和初始化阶段。

items.en: To reduce the amount of experience needed to train visuomotor policies, we also introduce a pretraining scheme that allows us to train effective policies with a relatively small number of iterations. The pretraining steps are illustrated in Figure 3. The intuition behind our pretraining is that, although we ultimately seek to obtain sensorimotor policies that combine both vision and control, low-level aspects of vision can be initialized independently. To that end, we pretrain the convolutional layers of our network by predicting elements of 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t} that are not provided in the observation 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t}, such as the positions of objects in the scene. We also initially train the guiding trajectory distributions pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) independently of the convolutional network until the trajectories achieve a basic level of competence at the task, and then switch to full guided policy search with end-to-end training of πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}). In our implementation, we also initialize the first layer filters from the model of Szegedy et al. (2014), which is trained on ImageNet (Deng et al., 2009) classification. The initialization and pretraining scheme is described in Section 5.2.
items.zh: 为了减少训练视觉运动策略所需的经验量，我们还引入了一种预训练方案，使我们能够用相对较少的迭代次数训练出有效的策略。预训练步骤如图3所示。我们预训练的直觉是，尽管最终目标是获得结合视觉和控制的感知运动策略，但视觉的低级方面可以独立初始化。为此，我们通过预测观测值 $\mathbf{o}_t$ 中未提供的 $\mathbf{x}_t$ 元素（例如场景中物体的位置）来预训练网络的卷积层。我们还最初独立于卷积网络训练引导轨迹分布 $p_i(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$，直到轨迹在任务上达到基本的能力水平，然后切换到对 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{o}_t)$ 进行端到端训练的完整引导策略搜索。在我们的实现中，我们还从 Szegedy 等人（2014）的模型初始化第一层滤波器，该模型在 ImageNet（Deng 等人，2009）分类上训练。初始化和预训练方案在第5.2节中描述。

items.en: Guided policy search transforms policy search into a supervised learning problem, where the training set is generated by a simple trajectory-centric RL algorithm. This algorithm optimizes linear-Gaussian controllers pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}), and is described in Section 4.2. We refer to the trajectory distribution induced by pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) as pi​(τ)subscript𝑝𝑖𝜏p_{i}(\tau). Each pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) succeeds from different initial states. For example, in the task of placing a cap on a bottle, these initial states correspond to different positions of the bottle. By training on trajectories for multiple bottle positions, the final CNN policy can succeed from all initial states, and can generalize to other states from the same distribution.
items.zh: 引导策略搜索将策略搜索转化为一个监督学习问题，其中训练集由简单的以轨迹为中心的强化学习算法生成。该算法优化线性高斯控制器 $p_i(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$，并在第4.2节中描述。我们将由 $p_i(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$ 诱导的轨迹分布称为 $p_i(\tau)$。每个 $p_i(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$ 从不同的初始状态成功。例如，在将瓶盖放在瓶子上的任务中，这些初始状态对应于瓶子的不同位置。通过在多个瓶子位置的轨迹上训练，最终的 CNN 策略可以从所有初始状态成功，并泛化到同一分布中的其他状态。

items.en: The final policy πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}) learned with guided policy search is only provided with observations 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t} of the full state 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t}, and the dynamics are assumed to be unknown. A diagram of this method, which corresponds to an expanded version of the guided policy search box in Figure 3, is shown on the right. In the outer loop, we draw sample trajectories {τij}superscriptsubscript𝜏𝑖𝑗\{\tau_{i}^{j}\} for each initial state on the physical system by running the corresponding controller pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}). The samples are used to fit the dynamics pi​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}) that are used to improve pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}), and serve as training data for the policy. The inner loop alternates between optimizing each pi​(τ)subscript𝑝𝑖𝜏p_{i}(\tau) and optimizing the policy to match these trajectory distributions. The policy is trained to predict the actions along each trajectory from the observations 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t}, rather than the full state 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t}. This allows the policy to directly use raw observations at test time. This alternating optimization can be framed as an instance of the BADMM algorithm (Wang and Banerjee, 2014), which converges to a solution where the trajectory distributions and the policy have the same state distribution. This allows greedy supervised training of the policy to produce a policy with good long-horizon performance.
items.zh: 通过引导策略学习到的最终策略 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{o}_t)$ 仅提供完整状态 $\mathbf{x}_t$ 的观测值 $\mathbf{o}_t$，并且假设动力学未知。该方法的示意图（对应于图3中引导策略搜索框的扩展版本）如右图所示。在外循环中，我们通过在物理系统上运行相应的控制器 $p_i(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$，为每个初始状态抽取样本轨迹 $\{\tau_i^j\}$。这些样本用于拟合用于改进 $p_i(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$ 的动力学 $p_i(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_t,\mathbf{u}_t)$，并作为策略的训练数据。内循环交替优化每个 $p_i(\tau)$ 和优化策略以匹配这些轨迹分布。策略被训练为根据观测值 $\mathbf{o}_t$（而非完整状态 $\mathbf{x}_t$）预测每条轨迹上的动作。这使得策略在测试时可以直接使用原始观测值。这种交替优化可以视为 BADMM 算法（Wang 和 Banerjee，2014）的一个实例，该算法收敛到轨迹分布和策略具有相同状态分布的解。这使得策略的贪婪监督训练能够产生具有良好长时域性能的策略。

items.en: Policy search methods minimize the expected cost Eπθ​[ℓ​(τ)]subscript𝐸subscript𝜋𝜃delimited-[]ℓ𝜏E_{\pi_{\theta}}[\ell(\tau)], where τ={𝐱1,𝐮1,…,𝐱T,𝐮T}𝜏subscript𝐱1subscript𝐮1…subscript𝐱𝑇subscript𝐮𝑇\tau=\{\mathbf{x}_{1},\mathbf{u}_{1},\dots,\mathbf{x}_{T},\mathbf{u}_{T}\} is a trajectory, and ℓ​(τ)=∑t=1Tℓ​(𝐱t,𝐮t)ℓ𝜏superscriptsubscript𝑡1𝑇ℓsubscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡\ell(\tau)=\sum_{t=1}^{T}\ell(\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}) is the cost of an episode. In the fully observed case, the expectation is taken under πθ​(τ)=p​(𝐱1)​∏t=1Tπθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)​p​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)subscript𝜋𝜃𝜏𝑝subscript𝐱1superscriptsubscriptproduct𝑡1𝑇subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\tau)=p(\mathbf{x}_{1})\prod_{t=1}^{T}\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}). The final policy πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}) is conditioned on the observations 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t}, but πθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) can be recovered as πθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)=∫πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)​p​(𝐨t|𝐱t)​𝑑𝐨tsubscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐨𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡differential-dsubscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})=\int\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t})p(\mathbf{o}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})d\mathbf{o}_{t}. We will present the derivation in this section for πθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}), but we do not require knowledge of p​(𝐨t|𝐱t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐨𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p(\mathbf{o}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) in the final algorithm. As discussed in Section 4.3, the integral will be evaluated with samples from the real system, which include both 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t} and 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t}. We begin by rewriting the expected cost minimization as a constrained problem:
items.zh: 策略搜索方法最小化期望代价 $E_{\pi_\theta}[\ell(\tau)]$，其中 $\tau=\{\mathbf{x}_1,\mathbf{u}_1,\dots,\mathbf{x}_T,\mathbf{u}_T\}$ 是一条轨迹，$\ell(\tau)=\sum_{t=1}^T\ell(\mathbf{x}_t,\mathbf{u}_t)$ 是一个回合的代价。在完全观测的情况下，期望在 $\pi_\theta(\tau)=p(\mathbf{x}_1)\prod_{t=1}^T\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_t,\mathbf{u}_t)$ 下计算。最终策略 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{o}_t)$ 以观测值 $\mathbf{o}_t$ 为条件，但 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$ 可以通过 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)=\int\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{o}_t)p(\mathbf{o}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)d\mathbf{o}_t$ 恢复。我们将在本节中针对 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$ 进行推导，但在最终算法中不需要知道 $p(\mathbf{o}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$。如第4.3节所述，该积分将通过来自真实系统的样本（包括 $\mathbf{x}_t$ 和 $\mathbf{o}_t$）进行评估。我们首先将期望代价最小化重写为一个约束问题：

items.en: where we will refer to p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau) as a guiding distribution. This formulation is equivalent to the original problem, since the constraint forces the two distributions to be identical. However, if we approximate the initial state distribution p​(𝐱1)𝑝subscript𝐱1p(\mathbf{x}_{1}) with samples 𝐱1isuperscriptsubscript𝐱1𝑖\mathbf{x}_{1}^{i}, we can choose p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau) to be a class of distributions that is much easier to optimize than πθsubscript𝜋𝜃\pi_{\theta}, as we will show later. This will allow us to use simple local learning methods for p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau), without needing to train the complex neural network policy πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}) directly with reinforcement learning, which would require a prohibitive amount of experience on real physical systems.
items.zh: 其中我们将 $p(\tau)$ 称为引导分布。该公式等价于原始问题，因为约束迫使两个分布相同。然而，如果我们用样本 $\mathbf{x}_1^i$ 近似初始状态分布 $p(\mathbf{x}_1)$，我们可以选择 $p(\tau)$ 为一类比 $\pi_\theta$ 更容易优化的分布类，正如我们稍后将展示的。这将允许我们对 $p(\tau)$ 使用简单的局部学习方法，而无需直接通过强化学习训练复杂的神经网络策略 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{o}_t)$，后者在真实物理系统上需要大量的经验。

items.en: The constrained problem can be solved by a dual descent method, which alternates between minimizing the Lagrangian with respect to the primal variables, and incrementing the Lagrange multipliers by their subgradient. Minimization of the Lagrangian with respect to p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau) and θ𝜃\theta is done in alternating fashion: minimizing with respect to θ𝜃\theta corresponds to supervised learning (making πθsubscript𝜋𝜃\pi_{\theta} match p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau)), and minimizing with respect to p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau) consists of one or more trajectory optimization problems. The dual descent method we use is based on BADMM (Wang and Banerjee, 2014), a variant of ADMM (Boyd et al., 2011) that augments the Lagrangian with a Bregman divergence between the constrained variables. We use the KL-divergence as the Bregman constraint, which is particularly convenient for working with probability distributions. We will also modify the constraint p​(𝐮t|𝐱t)=πθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})=\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) by multiplying both sides by p​(𝐱t)𝑝subscript𝐱𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t}), to get p​(𝐮t|𝐱t)​p​(𝐱t)=πθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)​p​(𝐱t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡𝑝subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡𝑝subscript𝐱𝑡p(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})p(\mathbf{x}_{t})=\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})p(\mathbf{x}_{t}). This constraint is equivalent, but has the convenient property that we can express the Lagrangian in terms of expectations. The BADMM augmented Lagrangians for θ𝜃\theta and p𝑝p are therefore given by
items.zh: 该约束问题可以通过对偶下降法求解，该方法交替进行关于原始变量的拉格朗日函数最小化和拉格朗日乘子的次梯度递增。关于 $p(\tau)$ 和 $\theta$ 的拉格朗日函数最小化以交替方式进行：关于 $\theta$ 的最小化对应于监督学习（使 $\pi_\theta$ 匹配 $p(\tau)$），而关于 $p(\tau)$ 的最小化包含一个或多个轨迹优化问题。我们使用的对偶下降法基于 BADMM（Wang 和 Banerjee，2014），这是 ADMM（Boyd 等人，2011）的一个变体，它用约束变量之间的 Bregman 散度增强拉格朗日函数。我们使用 KL 散度作为 Bregman 约束，这对于处理概率分布特别方便。我们还将通过将约束 $p(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)=\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$ 两边乘以 $p(\mathbf{x}_t)$ 来修改它，得到 $p(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)p(\mathbf{x}_t)=\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)p(\mathbf{x}_t)$。该约束是等价的，但具有我们可以用期望表示拉格朗日函数的便利性质。因此，关于 $\theta$ 和 $p$ 的 BADMM 增强拉格朗日函数由下式给出：

The parameter α𝛼\alpha is a step size. As with most augmented Lagrangian methods, the weight νtsubscript𝜈𝑡\nu_{t} is set heuristically, as described in Appendix A.1.
items.zh: 该过程是 BADMM 的一个实例，因此继承了其收敛性保证。注意，我们在每一行中删除了与优化变量无关的项。参数 $\alpha$ 是步长。与大多数增强拉格朗日方法一样，权重 $\nu_t$ 是启发式设置的，如附录 A.1 所述。

items.en: The dynamics only affect the optimization with respect to p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau). In order to make this optimization efficient, we choose p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau) to be a mixture of N𝑁N Gaussians pi​(τ)subscript𝑝𝑖𝜏p_{i}(\tau), one for each initial state sample 𝐱1isuperscriptsubscript𝐱1𝑖\mathbf{x}_{1}^{i}. This makes the action conditionals pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) and the dynamics pi​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}) linear-Gaussian, as discussed in Section 4.2. This is a reasonable choice when the system is deterministic, or the noise is Gaussian or small, and we found that this approach is sufficiently tolerant to noise for use on real physical systems. Our choice of p𝑝p also assumes that the policy πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}) is conditionally Gaussian. This is also reasonable, since the mean and covariance of πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}) can be any nonlinear function of the observations 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t}, which themselves are a function of the unobserved state 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t}. In Section 4.2, we show how these assumptions enable each pi​(τ)subscript𝑝𝑖𝜏p_{i}(\tau) to be optimized very efficiently. We will refer to pi​(τ)subscript𝑝𝑖𝜏p_{i}(\tau) as guiding distributions, since they serve to focus the policy on good, low-cost behaviors.
items.zh: 动力学仅影响关于 $p(\tau)$ 的优化。为了使该优化高效，我们选择 $p(\tau)$ 为 $N$ 个高斯分布 $p_i(\tau)$ 的混合，每个对应一个初始状态样本 $\mathbf{x}_1^i$。这使得动作条件分布 $p_i(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$ 和动力学 $p_i(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_t,\mathbf{u}_t)$ 是线性高斯的，如第4.2节所述。当系统是确定性的，或者噪声是高斯或较小时，这是一个合理的选择，我们发现这种方法对噪声的容忍度足以用于真实物理系统。我们对 $p$ 的选择还假设策略 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{o}_t)$ 是条件高斯的。这也是合理的，因为 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{o}_t)$ 的均值和协方差可以是观测值 $\mathbf{o}_t$ 的任何非线性函数，而观测值本身是未观测状态 $\mathbf{x}_t$ 的函数。在第4.2节中，我们展示了这些假设如何使每个 $p_i(\tau)$ 能够非常高效地优化。我们将 $p_i(\tau)$ 称为引导分布，因为它们用于将策略聚焦于好的、低代价的行为。

items.en: Aside from learning pi​(τ)subscript𝑝𝑖𝜏p_{i}(\tau), we must choose a tractable way to represent the infinite set of constraints p​(𝐮t|𝐱t)​p​(𝐱t)=πθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)​p​(𝐱t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡𝑝subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡𝑝subscript𝐱𝑡p(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})p(\mathbf{x}_{t})=\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})p(\mathbf{x}_{t}). One approximate approach proposed in prior work is to replace the exact constraints with expectations of features (Peters et al., 2010). When the features consist of linear, quadratic, or higher order monomial functions of the random variable, this can be viewed as a constraint on the moments of the distributions. If we only use the first moment, we get a constraint on the expected action: Ep​(𝐮t|𝐱t)​p​(𝐱t)​[𝐮t]=Eπθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)​p​(𝐱t)​[𝐮t]subscript𝐸𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡𝑝subscript𝐱𝑡delimited-[]subscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐸subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡𝑝subscript𝐱𝑡delimited-[]subscript𝐮𝑡E_{p(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})p(\mathbf{x}_{t})}[\mathbf{u}_{t}]=E_{\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})p(\mathbf{x}_{t})}[\mathbf{u}_{t}]. If the stochasticity in the dynamics is low, as we assumed previously, the optimal solution for each pi​(τ)subscript𝑝𝑖𝜏p_{i}(\tau) will have low entropy, making this first moment constraint a reasonable approximation. The KL-divergence terms in the augmented Lagrangians will still serve to softly enforce agreement between the higher moments. While this simplification is quite drastic, we found that it was more stable in practice than including higher moments, likely because these higher moments are harder to estimate accurately with a limited number of samples. The alternating optimization is now given by
items.zh: 除了学习 $p_i(\tau)$，我们必须选择一种可处理的方式来表示无限约束集 $p(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)p(\mathbf{x}_t)=\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)p(\mathbf{x}_t)$。先前工作中提出的一种近似方法是用特征的期望替换精确约束（Peters 等人，2010）。当特征由随机变量的线性、二次或更高次单项式函数组成时，这可以视为对分布矩的约束。如果我们只使用一阶矩，我们得到对期望动作的约束：$E_{p(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)p(\mathbf{x}_t)}[\mathbf{u}_t]=E_{\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)p(\mathbf{x}_t)}[\mathbf{u}_t]$。如果动力学中的随机性较低，正如我们之前假设的，每个 $p_i(\tau)$ 的最优解将具有低熵，使得这个一阶矩约束成为一个合理的近似。增强拉格朗日函数中的 KL 散度项仍将软性地强制高阶矩之间的一致性。虽然这种简化相当剧烈，但我们发现它在实践中比包含高阶矩更稳定，很可能是因为这些高阶矩难以用有限数量的样本准确估计。交替优化现在由下式给出：

In the rest of the paper, we will use ℒθ​(θ,p)subscriptℒ𝜃𝜃𝑝\mathcal{L}_{\theta}(\theta,p) and ℒp​(p,θ)subscriptℒ𝑝𝑝𝜃\mathcal{L}_{p}(p,\theta) to denote the two augmented Lagrangians in Equations (2) and (3), respectively. In the next two sections, we will describe how ℒp​(p,θ)subscriptℒ𝑝𝑝𝜃\mathcal{L}_{p}(p,\theta) can be optimized with respect to p𝑝p under unknown dynamics, and how ℒθ​(θ,p)subscriptℒ𝜃𝜃𝑝\mathcal{L}_{\theta}(\theta,p) can be optimized for complex, high-dimensional policies. Implementation details of the BADMM optimization are presented in Appendix A.1.

full.secZh: 4.2 未知动力学下的轨迹优化

When there are multiple mixture elements, this procedure is applied in parallel to each pi​(τ)subscript𝑝𝑖𝜏p_{i}(\tau). Since p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau) is Gaussian, the conditionals p​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}) and p​(𝐮t|𝐱t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}), which correspond to the dynamics and the controller, are time-varying linear-Gaussian, and given by

items.en: This type of controller can be learned efficiently with a small number of real-world samples, making it a good choice for optimizing the guiding distributions. Since a different set of time-varying linear-Gaussian dynamics is fitted for each initial state, this dynamics representation can model any continuous deterministic system that can be locally linearized. Stochastic dynamics can violate the local linearity assumption in principle, but we found that in practice this representation was well suited for a wide variety of noisy real-world tasks.
items.zh: 这种类型的控制器可以用少量真实世界样本高效学习，使其成为优化引导分布的良好选择。由于为每个初始状态拟合了一组不同的时变线性高斯动力学，这种动力学表示可以建模任何可以局部线性化的连续确定性系统。随机动力学原则上可能违反局部线性假设，但我们发现实际上这种表示非常适合各种嘈杂的真实世界任务。

items.en: The dynamics are determined by the environment. If they are known, p​(𝐮t|𝐱t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) can be optimized with a variant of the iterative linear-quadratic-Gaussian regulator (iLQG) (Li and Todorov, 2004; Levine and Koltun, 2013a), which is a variant of DDP (Jacobson and Mayne, 1970). In the case of unknown dynamics, we can fit p​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}) to sample trajectories sampled from the trajectory distribution at the previous iteration, denoted p^​(τ)^𝑝𝜏\hat{p}(\tau). If p^​(τ)^𝑝𝜏\hat{p}(\tau) is too different from p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau), these samples will not give a good estimate of p​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}), and the optimization will diverge. To avoid this, we can bound the change from p^​(τ)^𝑝𝜏\hat{p}(\tau) to p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau) in terms of their KL-divergence by a step size ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon, producing the following constrained problem:
items.zh: 动力学由环境决定。如果已知，$p(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$ 可以用迭代线性二次高斯调节器（iLQG）的变体（Li 和 Todorov，2004；Levine 和 Koltun，2013a）进行优化，该变体是 DDP（Jacobson 和 Mayne，1970）的变体。在动力学未知的情况下，我们可以将 $p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_t,\mathbf{u}_t)$ 拟合到从上一迭代的轨迹分布（记为 $\hat{p}(\tau)$）采样的样本轨迹。如果 $\hat{p}(\tau)$ 与 $p(\tau)$ 差异太大，这些样本将无法给出 $p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_t,\mathbf{u}_t)$ 的良好估计，优化将发散。为避免这种情况，我们可以通过步长 $\epsilon$ 限制从 $\hat{p}(\tau)$ 到 $p(\tau)$ 的变化（以 KL 散度衡量），从而产生以下约束问题：

items.en: This type of policy update has previously been proposed by several authors in the context of policy search (Bagnell and Schneider, 2003; Peters and Schaal, 2008; Peters et al., 2010; Levine and Abbeel, 2014). In the case when p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau) is Gaussian, this problem can be solved efficiently using dual gradient descent, while the dynamics p​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}) are fitted to samples gathered by running the previous controller p^​(𝐮t|𝐱t)^𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡\hat{p}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) on the robot. Fitting a global Gaussian mixture model to tuples (𝐱t,𝐮t,𝐱t+1)subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡1(\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t},\mathbf{x}_{t+1}) and using it as a prior for fitting the dynamics p​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}) serves to greatly reduce the sample complexity. We describe the dynamics fitting procedure in detail in Appendix A.3.
items.zh: 这种类型的策略更新先前已被几位作者在策略搜索的背景下提出（Bagnell 和 Schneider，2003；Peters 和 Schaal，2008；Peters 等人，2010；Levine 和 Abbeel，2014）。在 $p(\tau)$ 是高斯的的情况下，该问题可以使用对偶梯度下降高效求解，而动力学 $p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_t,\mathbf{u}_t)$ 则通过运行先前的控制器 $\hat{p}(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$ 在机器人上收集的样本进行拟合。将全局高斯混合模型拟合到元组 $(\mathbf{x}_t,\mathbf{u}_t,\mathbf{x}_{t+1})$ 并将其用作拟合动力学 $p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_t,\mathbf{u}_t)$ 的先验，可以大大降低样本复杂度。我们在附录 A.3 中详细描述了动力学拟合过程。

items.en: Note that the trajectory optimization cost function ℒp​(p,θ)subscriptℒ𝑝𝑝𝜃\mathcal{L}_{p}(p,\theta) also depends on the policy πθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}), while we only have access to πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}). In order to compute a local quadratic expansion of the KL-divergence term DKL(p(𝐮t|𝐱t)∥πθ(𝐮t|𝐱t))D_{\text{KL}}(p(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})\|\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t})) inside ℒp​(p,θ)subscriptℒ𝑝𝑝𝜃\mathcal{L}_{p}(p,\theta) for iLQG, we also estimate a linearization of the mean of the conditionally Gaussian policy πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}) with respect to the state 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t}, using the same procedure that we use to linearize the dynamics. The data for this estimation consists of tuples {𝐱ti,Eπθ​(𝐮t|𝐨ti)​[𝐮t]}superscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡𝑖subscript𝐸subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡superscriptsubscript𝐨𝑡𝑖delimited-[]subscript𝐮𝑡\{\mathbf{x}_{t}^{i},E_{\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}^{i})}[\mathbf{u}_{t}]\}, which we can obtain because both the states 𝐱tisuperscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡𝑖\mathbf{x}_{t}^{i} and the observations 𝐨tisuperscriptsubscript𝐨𝑡𝑖\mathbf{o}_{t}^{i} are available for all of the samples evaluated on the real physical system.
items.zh: 注意，轨迹优化代价函数 $\mathcal{L}_p(p,\theta)$ 也依赖于策略 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$，而我们只有 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{o}_t)$。为了计算 $\mathcal{L}_p(p,\theta)$ 内部用于 iLQG 的 KL 散度项 $D_{\text{KL}}(p(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)\|\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t))$ 的局部二次展开，我们还估计了条件高斯策略 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{o}_t)$ 的均值相对于状态 $\mathbf{x}_t$ 的线性化，使用与线性化动力学相同的过程。该估计的数据由元组 $\{\mathbf{x}_t^i, E_{\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{o}_t^i)}[\mathbf{u}_t]\}$ 组成，我们可以获得这些数据，因为在真实物理系统上评估的所有样本中，状态 $\mathbf{x}_t^i$ 和观测值 $\mathbf{o}_t^i$ 都是可用的。

items.en: This constrained optimization is performed in the “inner loop” of the optimization described in the previous section, and the KL-divergence constraint DKL​(p​(τ)∥p^​(τ))≤ϵsubscript𝐷KLconditional𝑝𝜏^𝑝𝜏italic-ϵD_{\text{KL}}(p(\tau)\|\hat{p}(\tau))\leq\epsilon imposes a step size on the trajectory update. The overall algorithm then becomes an instance of generalized BADMM (Wang and Banerjee, 2014). Note that the augmented Lagrangian ℒp​(p,θ)subscriptℒ𝑝𝑝𝜃\mathcal{L}_{p}(p,\theta) consists of an expectation under p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau) of a quantity that is independent of p𝑝p. We can locally approximate this quantity with a quadratic by using a quadratic expansion of ℓ​(𝐱t,𝐮t)ℓsubscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡\ell(\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}), and fitting a linear-Gaussian to πθ​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) with the same method we used for the dynamics. We can then solve the primal optimization in the dual gradient descent procedure with a standard LQR backward pass. This is significantly simpler and much faster than the forward-backward dynamic programming procedure employed in previous work (Levine and Abbeel, 2014; Levine and Koltun, 2014). This improvement is enabled by the use of BADMM, which allows us to always formulate the KL-divergence term in the Lagrangian with the distribution being optimized as the first argument. Since the KL-divergence is convex in its first argument, this makes the corresponding optimization significantly easier. The details of this LQR-based dual gradient descent algorithm are derived in Appendix A.4.
items.zh: 该约束优化在上一节描述的优化的“内循环”中执行，KL 散度约束 $D_{\text{KL}}(p(\tau)\|\hat{p}(\tau))\leq\epsilon$ 对轨迹更新施加了步长。整体算法因此成为广义 BADMM（Wang 和 Banerjee，2014）的一个实例。注意，增强拉格朗日函数 $\mathcal{L}_p(p,\theta)$ 由 $p(\tau)$ 下与 $p$ 无关的量的期望组成。我们可以通过使用 $\ell(\mathbf{x}_t,\mathbf{u}_t)$ 的二次展开，并用与动力学相同的方法拟合 $\pi_\theta(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$ 的线性高斯模型，来局部近似该量为二次形式。然后，我们可以使用标准的 LQR 反向传播在对偶梯度下降过程中求解原始优化。这比先前工作中使用的前向-反向动态规划过程（Levine 和 Abbeel，2014；Levine 和 Koltun，2014）简单得多且快得多。这一改进得益于 BADMM 的使用，它允许我们始终将拉格朗日函数中的 KL 散度项表述为被优化分布作为第一个参数。由于 KL 散度关于其第一个参数是凸的，这使得相应的优化变得容易得多。这种基于 LQR 的对偶梯度下降算法的细节在附录 A.4 中推导。

items.en: We can further improve the efficiency of the method by allowing samples from multiple trajectories pi​(τ)subscript𝑝𝑖𝜏p_{i}(\tau) to be used to fit a shared dynamics p​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}), while the controllers pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) are allowed to vary. This makes sense when the initial states of these trajectories are similar, and they therefore visit similar regions. This allows us to draw just a single sample from each pi​(τ)subscript𝑝𝑖𝜏p_{i}(\tau) at each iteration, allowing us to handle many more initial states.
items.zh: 我们可以通过允许多条轨迹 $p_i(\tau)$ 的样本用于拟合共享动力学 $p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_t,\mathbf{u}_t)$，同时允许控制器 $p_i(\mathbf{u}_t|\mathbf{x}_t)$ 变化，来进一步提高方法的效率。当这些轨迹的初始状态相似，因此它们访问相似区域时，这是有意义的。这允许我们在每次迭代中仅从每个 $p_i(\tau)$ 抽取一个样本，从而能够处理更多的初始状态。

items.en: Since the policy parameters θ𝜃\theta participate only in the constraints of the optimization problem in Equation (1), optimizing the policy corresponds to minimizing the KL-divergence between the policy and trajectory distribution, as well as the expectation of λμ​tT​𝐮tsuperscriptsubscript𝜆𝜇𝑡Tsubscript𝐮𝑡\lambda_{\mu t}^{\mathrm{T}}\mathbf{u}_{t}. For a conditional Gaussian policy of the form πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)=𝒩​(μπ​(𝐨t),Σπ​(𝐨t))subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡𝒩superscript𝜇𝜋subscript𝐨𝑡superscriptΣ𝜋subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t})=\mathcal{N}(\mu^{\pi}(\mathbf{o}_{t}),\Sigma^{\pi}(\mathbf{o}_{t})), the objective is
