items.en: where μt​ip​(𝐱t)subscriptsuperscript𝜇𝑝𝑡𝑖subscript𝐱𝑡\mu^{p}_{ti}(\mathbf{x}_{t}) is the mean of pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) and 𝐂t​isubscript𝐂𝑡𝑖\mathbf{C}_{ti} is the covariance, and the expectation is evaluated using samples from each pi​(τ)subscript𝑝𝑖𝜏p_{i}(\tau) with corresponding observations 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t}. The observations are sampled from p​(𝐨t|𝐱t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐨𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p(\mathbf{o}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) by recording camera images on the real system. Since the input to μπ​(𝐨t)superscript𝜇𝜋subscript𝐨𝑡\mu^{\pi}(\mathbf{o}_{t}) and Σπ​(𝐨t)superscriptΣ𝜋subscript𝐨𝑡\Sigma^{\pi}(\mathbf{o}_{t}) is not the state 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t}, but only an observation 𝐨tsubscript𝐨𝑡\mathbf{o}_{t}, we can train the policy to directly use raw observations. Note that ℒθ​(θ,p)subscriptℒ𝜃𝜃𝑝\mathcal{L}_{\theta}(\theta,p) is simply a weighted quadratic loss on the difference between the policy mean and the mean action of the trajectory distribution, offset by the Lagrange multiplier. The weighting is the precision matrix of the conditional in the trajectory distribution, which is equal to the curvature of its cost-to-go function (Levine and Koltun, 2013a). This has an intuitive interpretation: ℒθ​(θ,p)subscriptℒ𝜃𝜃𝑝\mathcal{L}_{\theta}(\theta,p) penalizes deviation from the trajectory distribution, with a penalty that is locally proportional to its cost-to-go. At convergence, when the policy πθ​(𝐮t|𝐨t)subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐨𝑡\pi_{\theta}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{o}_{t}) takes the same actions as pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}), their Q-functions are equal, and the supervised policy objective becomes equivalent to the policy iteration objective (Levine and Koltun, 2014)
items.zh: 其中μtip(𝐱t)是pi(𝐮t|𝐱t)的均值，𝐂ti是协方差，期望通过从每个pi(τ)中采样并对应观测𝐨t来评估。观测通过记录真实系统上的相机图像从p(𝐨t|𝐱t)中采样。由于μπ(𝐨t)和Σπ(𝐨t)的输入不是状态𝐱t，而仅是观测𝐨t，我们可以训练策略直接使用原始观测。注意，ℒθ(θ,p)仅仅是策略均值与轨迹分布均值动作之间差异的加权二次损失，偏移了拉格朗日乘子。权重是轨迹分布中条件分布的精度矩阵，等于其代价函数的曲率（Levine和Koltun，2013a）。这有一个直观的解释：ℒθ(θ,p)惩罚偏离轨迹分布的行为，惩罚局部与其代价函数成正比。收敛时，当策略πθ(𝐮t|𝐨t)采取与pi(𝐮t|𝐱t)相同的动作时，它们的Q函数相等，监督策略目标等价于策略迭代目标（Levine和Koltun，2014）。

items.en: In this work, we optimize ℒθ​(θ,p)subscriptℒ𝜃𝜃𝑝\mathcal{L}_{\theta}(\theta,p) with respect to θ𝜃\theta using stochastic gradient descent (SGD), a standard method for neural network training. The covariance of the Gaussian policy does not depend on the observation in our implementation, though adding this dependence would be straightforward. Since training complex neural networks requires a substantial number of samples, we found it beneficial to include sampled observations from previous iterations into the policy optimization, evaluating the action μt​ip​(𝐱t)subscriptsuperscript𝜇𝑝𝑡𝑖subscript𝐱𝑡\mu^{p}_{ti}(\mathbf{x}_{t}) at their corresponding states using the current trajectory distributions. Since these samples come from the wrong state distribution, we use importance sampling and weight them according to the ratio of their probability under the current distribution p​(𝐱t)𝑝subscript𝐱𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t}) and the one they were sampled from, which is straightforward to evaluate under the estimated linear-Gaussian dynamics (Levine and Koltun, 2013b).
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们使用随机梯度下降（SGD）优化ℒθ(θ,p)关于θ，这是神经网络训练的标准方法。在我们的实现中，高斯策略的协方差不依赖于观测，尽管添加这种依赖关系是直接的。由于训练复杂的神经网络需要大量样本，我们发现将先前迭代中的采样观测纳入策略优化是有益的，使用当前轨迹分布评估其对应状态下的动作μtip(𝐱t)。由于这些样本来自错误的状态分布，我们使用重要性采样，并根据它们在当前分布p(𝐱t)下的概率与采样来源分布的概率之比进行加权，这在估计的线性高斯动力学下很容易评估（Levine和Koltun，2013b）。

full.sec: 4.4 Comparison with Prior Guided Policy Search Methods
full.secZh: 4.4 与先前引导策略搜索方法的比较

items.en: We presented a guided policy search method where the policy is trained on observations, while the trajectories are trained on the full state. The BADMM formulation of guided policy search is new to this work, though several prior guided policy search methods based on constrained optimization have been proposed. Levine and Koltun (2014) proposed a formulation similar to Equation (1), but with a constraint on the KL-divergence between p​(τ)𝑝𝜏p(\tau) and πθsubscript𝜋𝜃\pi_{\theta}. This results in a more complex, non-convex forward-backward trajectory optimization phase. Since the BADMM formulation solves a convex problem during the trajectory optimization phase, it is substantially faster and easier to implement and use, especially when the number of trajectories pi​(τ)subscript𝑝𝑖𝜏p_{i}(\tau) is large.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种引导策略搜索方法，其中策略在观测上训练，而轨迹在全状态上训练。BADMM形式的引导策略搜索是这项工作的新贡献，尽管之前已经提出了几种基于约束优化的引导策略搜索方法。Levine和Koltun（2014）提出了类似于公式(1)的公式，但对p(τ)和πθ之间的KL散度施加了约束。这导致了一个更复杂的非凸前向后向轨迹优化阶段。由于BADMM公式在轨迹优化阶段求解凸问题，因此它更快且更易于实现和使用，特别是当轨迹pi(τ)数量很大时。

items.en: The use of ADMM for guided policy search was also proposed by Mordatch and Todorov (2014) for deterministic policies under known dynamics. This approach requires known, deterministic dynamics and trains deterministic policies. Furthermore, because this approach uses a simple quadratic augmented Lagrangian term, it further requires penalty terms on the gradient of the policy to account for local feedback. Our approach enforces this feedback behavior due to the higher moments included in the KL-divergence term, but does not require computing the second derivative of the policy.
items.zh: 使用ADMM进行引导策略搜索也由Mordatch和Todorov（2014）提出，用于已知动力学下的确定性策略。该方法需要已知的确定性动力学并训练确定性策略。此外，由于该方法使用简单的二次增广拉格朗日项，它还需要对策略梯度施加惩罚项以考虑局部反馈。我们的方法由于KL散度项中包含的高阶矩而强制执行这种反馈行为，但不需要计算策略的二阶导数。

items.en: Guided policy search allows us to optimize complex, high-dimensional policies with raw observations, such as when the input to the policy consists of images from a robot’s onboard camera. However, leveraging this capability to directly learn policies for visuomotor control requires designing a policy representation that is both data-efficient and capable of learning complex control strategies directly from raw visual inputs. In this section, we describe a deep convolutional neural network (CNN) model that is uniquely suited to this task. Our approach combines a novel spatial soft-argmax layer with a pretraining procedure that provides for flexibility and data-efficiency.
items.zh: 引导策略搜索使我们能够优化具有原始观测的复杂高维策略，例如当策略输入来自机器人车载相机的图像时。然而，利用这种能力直接学习视觉运动控制策略需要设计一种既数据高效又能直接从原始视觉输入学习复杂控制策略的策略表示。在本节中，我们描述了一种深度卷积神经网络（CNN）模型，该模型特别适合此任务。我们的方法结合了一种新颖的空间soft-argmax层和预训练过程，提供了灵活性和数据效率。

items.en: Our visuomotor policy runs at 20 Hz on the robot, mapping monocular RGB images and the robot configurations to joint torques on a 7 DoF arm. The configuration includes the angles of the joints and the pose of the end-effector (defined by 3 points in the space of the end-effector), as well as their velocities, but does not include the position of the target object or goal, which must be determined from the image. CNNs often use pooling to discard the locational information that is necessary to determine positions, since it is an irrelevant distractor for tasks such as object classification (Lee et al., 2009). Because locational information is important for control, our policy does not use pooling. Additionally, CNNs built for spatial tasks such as human pose estimation often also rely on the availability of location labels in image-space, such as hand-labeled keypoints (Tompson et al., 2014). We propose a novel CNN architecture capable of estimating spatial information from an image without direct supervision in image space. Our pose estimation experiments, discussed in Section 5.2, show that this network can learn useful visual features using only 3D position information provided by the robot, and no camera calibration. Further training the network with guided policy search to directly output motor torques causes it to acquire task-specific visual features. Our experiments in Section 6.4 show that this improves performance beyond the level achieved with features trained only for pose estimation.
items.zh: 我们的视觉运动策略在机器人上以20 Hz运行，将单目RGB图像和机器人配置映射到7自由度手臂的关节扭矩。配置包括关节角度和末端执行器的位姿（由末端执行器空间中的3个点定义），以及它们的速度，但不包括目标物体或目标的位置，这些必须从图像中确定。CNN通常使用池化来丢弃确定位置所需的位置信息，因为对于物体分类等任务，它是无关的干扰因素（Lee等人，2009）。由于位置信息对控制很重要，我们的策略不使用池化。此外，为空间任务（如人体姿态估计）构建的CNN通常也依赖于图像空间中位置标签的可用性，例如手动标记的关键点（Tompson等人，2014）。我们提出了一种新颖的CNN架构，能够从图像中估计空间信息，而无需图像空间中的直接监督。我们在5.2节中讨论的姿态估计实验表明，该网络仅使用机器人提供的3D位置信息，无需相机标定，就能学习有用的视觉特征。通过引导策略搜索进一步训练网络直接输出电机扭矩，使其获得任务特定的视觉特征。我们在6.4节中的实验表明，这比仅使用姿态估计训练的特征提高了性能。

items.en: Our network architecture is shown in Figure 2. The visual processing layers of the network consist of three convolutional layers, each of which learns a bank of filters that are applied to patches centered on every pixel of its input. These filters form a hierarchy of local image features. Each convolutional layer is followed by a rectifying nonlinearity of the form ac​i​j=max⁡(0,zc​i​j)subscript𝑎𝑐𝑖𝑗0subscript𝑧𝑐𝑖𝑗a_{cij}=\max(0,z_{cij}) for each channel c𝑐c and each pixel coordinate (i,j)𝑖𝑗(i,j). The third convolutional layer contains 323232 response maps with resolution 109×109109109109\times 109. These response maps are passed through a spatial softmax function of the form sc​i​j=eac​i​j/∑i′​j′eac​i′​j′subscript𝑠𝑐𝑖𝑗superscript𝑒subscript𝑎𝑐𝑖𝑗subscriptsuperscript𝑖′superscript𝑗′superscript𝑒subscript𝑎𝑐superscript𝑖′superscript𝑗′s_{cij}={e^{a_{cij}}}/{\sum_{i^{\prime}j^{\prime}}{e^{a_{ci^{\prime}j^{\prime}}}}}. Each output channel of the softmax is a probability distribution over the location of a feature in the image. To convert from this distribution to a coordinate representation (fc​x,fc​y)subscript𝑓𝑐𝑥subscript𝑓𝑐𝑦(f_{cx},f_{cy}), the network calculates the expected image position of each feature, yielding a 2D coordinate for each channel: fc​x=∑i​jsc​i​j​xi​jsubscript𝑓𝑐𝑥subscript𝑖𝑗subscript𝑠𝑐𝑖𝑗subscript𝑥𝑖𝑗f_{cx}=\sum_{ij}s_{cij}x_{ij} and fc​y=∑i​jsc​i​j​yi​jsubscript𝑓𝑐𝑦subscript𝑖𝑗subscript𝑠𝑐𝑖𝑗subscript𝑦𝑖𝑗f_{cy}=\sum_{ij}s_{cij}y_{ij}, where (xi​j,yi​j)subscript𝑥𝑖𝑗subscript𝑦𝑖𝑗(x_{ij},y_{ij}) is the image-space position of the point (i,j)𝑖𝑗(i,j) in the response map. Since this is a linear operation, it corresponds to a fixed, sparse fully connected layer with weights Wc​i​x=xi​jsubscript𝑊𝑐𝑖𝑥subscript𝑥𝑖𝑗W_{cix}=x_{ij} and Wc​j​y=yi​jsubscript𝑊𝑐𝑗𝑦subscript𝑦𝑖𝑗W_{cjy}=y_{ij}. The combination of the spatial softmax and expectation operator implement a kind of soft-argmax. The spatial feature points (fc​x,fc​y)subscript𝑓𝑐𝑥subscript𝑓𝑐𝑦(f_{cx},f_{cy}) are concatenated with the robot’s configuration and fed into two fully connected layers, each with 40 rectified units, followed by linear connections to the torques. The full network contains about 92,000 parameters, of which 86,000 are in the convolutional layers.
items.zh: 我们的网络架构如图2所示。网络的视觉处理层由三个卷积层组成，每个卷积层学习一组滤波器，这些滤波器应用于输入每个像素为中心的图像块。这些滤波器形成局部图像特征的层次结构。每个卷积层之后是一个整流非线性激活函数，形式为acij=max(0,zcij)，其中c是通道，(i,j)是像素坐标。第三个卷积层包含32个响应图，分辨率为109×109。这些响应图通过空间softmax函数，形式为scij=eacij/∑i'j'eaci'j'。softmax的每个输出通道是图像中特征位置的概率分布。为了从该分布转换为坐标表示(fcx,fcy)，网络计算每个特征的期望图像位置，为每个通道产生一个2D坐标：fcx=∑ijscijxij和fcy=∑ijscijyij，其中(xij,yij)是响应图中点(i,j)的图像空间位置。由于这是一个线性操作，它对应于一个固定的稀疏全连接层，权重为Wcix=xij和Wcjy=yij。空间softmax和期望算子的组合实现了一种soft-argmax。空间特征点(fcx,fcy)与机器人配置连接，并输入到两个全连接层，每个层有40个整流单元，然后通过线性连接输出扭矩。整个网络包含约92,000个参数，其中86,000个在卷积层中。

items.en: The spatial softmax and the expected position computation serve to convert pixel-wise representations in the convolutional layers to spatial coordinate representations, which can be manipulated by the fully connected layers into 3D positions or motor torques. The softmax also provides lateral inhibition, which suppresses low, erroneous activations, only keeping strong activations that are more likely to be accurate. This makes our policy more robust to distractors, providing generalization to novel visual variation. We compare our architecture with more standard alternatives in Section 6.3 and evaluate robustness to visual distractors in Section 6.4. However, the proposed architecture is also in some sense more specialized for visuomotor control, in contrast to more general standard convolutional networks. For example, not all perception tasks require information that can be coherently summarized by a set of spatial locations.
items.zh: 空间softmax和期望位置计算用于将卷积层中的逐像素表示转换为空间坐标表示，这些表示可以由全连接层处理为3D位置或电机扭矩。softmax还提供侧向抑制，抑制低且错误的激活，只保留更可能准确的强激活。这使得我们的策略对干扰因素更鲁棒，能够泛化到新颖的视觉变化。我们在6.3节中将我们的架构与更标准的替代方案进行比较，并在6.4节中评估对视觉干扰的鲁棒性。然而，所提出的架构在某种意义上也更专门用于视觉运动控制，与更通用的标准卷积网络形成对比。例如，并非所有感知任务都需要能够由一组空间位置连贯总结的信息。

items.en: The guided policy search trajectory optimization phase uses the full state of the system, though the final policy only uses the observations. This type of instrumented training is a natural choice for many robotics tasks, where the robot is trained under controlled conditions, but must then act intelligently in uncontrolled, real-world situations. In our tasks, the unobserved variables are the pose of a target object (e.g. the bottle on which a cap must be placed). During training, this target object is typically held in the robot’s left gripper, while the robot’s right arm performs the task, as shown to the right. This allows the robot to move the target through a range of known positions. The final visuomotor policy does not receive this position as input, but must instead use the camera images. Due to the modest amount of training data, distractors that are correlated with task-relevant variables can hamper generalization. For this reason, the left arm is covered with cloth to prevent the policy from associating its appearance with the object’s position.
items.zh: 引导策略搜索的轨迹优化阶段使用系统的全状态，尽管最终策略仅使用观测。这种仪器化训练是许多机器人任务的自然选择，其中机器人在受控条件下训练，但必须在不受控制的现实世界情况下智能地行动。在我们的任务中，未观测变量是目标物体的位姿（例如必须放置瓶盖的瓶子）。在训练期间，该目标物体通常被机器人的左夹爪夹持，而机器人的右臂执行任务，如右图所示。这使得机器人能够将目标移动到一系列已知位置。最终的视觉运动策略不接收该位置作为输入，而必须使用相机图像。由于训练数据量有限，与任务相关变量相关的干扰因素可能会妨碍泛化。因此，左臂用布覆盖，以防止策略将其外观与物体位置关联。

items.en: While we can train the visuomotor policy entirely from scratch, the algorithm would spend a large number of iterations learning basic visual features and arm motions that can more efficiently be learned by themselves, before being incorporated into the policy. To speed up learning, we initialize both the vision layers in the policy and the trajectory distributions for guided policy search by leveraging the fully observed training setup. To initialize the vision layers, the robot moves the target object through a range of random positions, recording camera images and the object’s pose, which is computed automatically from the pose of the gripper. This dataset is used to train a pose regression CNN, which consists of the same vision layers as the policy, followed by a fully connected layer that outputs the 3D points that define the target. Since the training set is still small (we use 1000 images collected from random arm motions), we initialize the filters in the first layer with weights from the model of Szegedy et al. (2014), which is trained on ImageNet (Deng et al., 2009) classification. After training on pose regression, the weights in the convolutional layers are transferred to the policy CNN. This enables the robot to learn the appearance of the objects prior to learning the behavior.
items.zh: 虽然我们可以从头开始训练视觉运动策略，但算法会花费大量迭代学习基本的视觉特征和手臂运动，而这些可以更有效地单独学习，然后再整合到策略中。为了加速学习，我们利用完全观测的训练设置来初始化策略中的视觉层和引导策略搜索的轨迹分布。为了初始化视觉层，机器人将目标物体移动到一系列随机位置，记录相机图像和物体的位姿（从夹爪的位姿自动计算）。该数据集用于训练姿态回归CNN，该网络包含与策略相同的视觉层，后跟一个输出定义目标的3D点的全连接层。由于训练集仍然很小（我们使用从随机手臂运动中收集的1000张图像），我们使用Szegedy等人（2014）的模型权重初始化第一层的滤波器，该模型在ImageNet（Deng等人，2009）分类上训练。在姿态回归训练后，卷积层的权重被转移到策略CNN。这使得机器人能够在学习行为之前学习物体的外观。

items.en: To initialize the linear-Gaussian controllers for each of the initial states, we take 15 iterations of guided policy search without optimizing the visuomotor policy. This allows for much faster training in the early iterations, when the trajectories are not yet successful, and optimizing the full visuomotor policy is unnecessarily time consuming. Since we still want the trajectories to arrive at compatible strategies for each target position, we replace the visuomotor policy during these iterations with a small network that receives the full state, which consisted of two layers with 40 rectified linear hidden units in our experiments. This network serves only to constrain the trajectories and avoid divergent behaviors from emerging for similar initial states, which would make subsequent policy learning difficult.
items.zh: 为了初始化每个初始状态的线性高斯控制器，我们进行15次引导策略搜索迭代而不优化视觉运动策略。这允许在早期迭代中更快地训练，此时轨迹尚未成功，优化完整的视觉运动策略不必要地耗时。由于我们仍然希望轨迹为每个目标位置达成兼容的策略，我们在这些迭代中用接收全状态的小网络替换视觉运动策略，该网络在我们的实验中由两个具有40个整流线性隐藏单元的层组成。该网络仅用于约束轨迹并避免相似初始状态出现发散行为，否则会使后续策略学习变得困难。

items.en: After initialization, we train the full visuomotor policy with guided policy search. During the supervised policy optimization phase, the fully connected motor control layers are first optimized by themselves, since they are not initialized with pretraining. This can be done very quickly because these layers are small. Then, the entire network is further optimized end-to-end. We found that first training the upper layers before end-to-end optimization prevented the convolutional layers from forgetting useful features learning during pretraining, when the error signal due to the untrained upper layers is very large. The entire pretraining scheme is summarized in the diagram on the right. Note that the trajectories can be pretrained in parallel with the vision layer pretraining, which does not require access to the physical system. Furthermore, the entire initialization procedure does not use any additional information that is not already available from the robot.
items.zh: 初始化后，我们使用引导策略搜索训练完整的视觉运动策略。在监督策略优化阶段，首先单独优化全连接电机控制层，因为它们没有通过预训练初始化。由于这些层很小，这可以非常快速地完成。然后，整个网络进一步端到端优化。我们发现，在端到端优化之前先训练上层，可以防止卷积层忘记预训练期间学习的有用特征，因为未训练的上层产生的误差信号非常大。整个预训练方案总结在右侧的图中。注意，轨迹可以与视觉层预训练并行进行，后者不需要访问物理系统。此外，整个初始化过程不使用任何机器人尚未提供的额外信息。

items.en: In this section, we present a series of experiments aimed at evaluating our approach and answering the following questions:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们提出了一系列实验，旨在评估我们的方法并回答以下问题：

items.en: How does the guided policy search algorithm compare to other policy search methods for training complex, high-dimensional policies, such as neural networks?
items.zh: 引导策略搜索算法与其他策略搜索方法（如训练复杂高维策略的神经网络）相比如何？

items.en: Does our trajectory optimization algorithm work on a real robotic platform with unknown dynamics, for a range of different tasks?
items.zh: 我们的轨迹优化算法是否能在具有未知动力学的真实机器人平台上工作，适用于一系列不同的任务？

items.en: How does our spatial softmax architecture compare to other, more standard convolutional neural network architectures?
items.zh: 我们的空间softmax架构与其他更标准的卷积神经网络架构相比如何？

items.en: Does training the perception and control systems in a visuomotor policy jointly end-to-end provide better performance than training each component separately?
items.zh: 在视觉运动策略中联合端到端训练感知和控制系统是否比单独训练每个组件提供更好的性能？

items.en: Evaluating a wide range of policy search algorithms on a real robot would be extremely time consuming, particularly for methods that require a large number of samples. We therefore answer question (1) by using a physical simulator and simpler policies that do not use vision. This also allows us to test the generality of guided policy search on tasks that include manipulation, walking, and swimming. To answer question (2), we present a wide range of experiments on a PR2 robot. These experiments allow us to evaluate the sample efficiency of our trajectory optimization algorithm. To address question (3), we compare a range of different policy architectures on the task of localizing a target object (the cube in the shape sorting cube task). Since localizing the target object is a prerequisite for completing the shape sorting cube task, this serves as a good proxy for evaluating different architectures. Finally, we answer the last and most important question (4) by training visuomotor policies for hanging a coat hanger on a clothes rack, inserting a block into a shape sorting cube, fitting the claw of a toy hammer under a nail with various grasps, and screwing on a bottle cap. These tasks are illustrated in Figure 8.
items.zh: 在真实机器人上评估各种策略搜索算法将极其耗时，尤其是对于需要大量样本的方法。因此，我们通过使用物理模拟器和不使用视觉的简单策略来回答问题（1）。这也使我们能够测试引导策略搜索在包括操作、行走和游泳在内的任务上的通用性。为了回答问题（2），我们在PR2机器人上进行了一系列实验。这些实验使我们能够评估轨迹优化算法的样本效率。为了解决问题（3），我们在定位目标物体（形状分类立方体任务中的立方体）的任务上比较了多种不同的策略架构。由于定位目标物体是完成形状分类立方体任务的先决条件，这可以作为评估不同架构的良好代理。最后，我们通过训练视觉运动策略来回答最后一个也是最重要的问题（4），这些策略包括将衣架挂在衣架上、将积木插入形状分类立方体、用各种抓取方式将玩具锤的爪子放在钉子下以及拧上瓶盖。这些任务如图8所示。

full.sec: 6.1 Simulated Comparisons to Prior Policy Search Methods
full.secZh: 6.1 与先前策略搜索方法的模拟比较

items.en: In this section, we compare our method against prior policy search techniques on a range of simulated robotic control tasks. These results previously appeared in our conference paper that introduced the trajectory optimization procedure with local linear models (Levine and Abbeel, 2014). In these tasks, the state 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t} consists of the joint angles and velocities of each robot, and the actions 𝐮tsubscript𝐮𝑡\mathbf{u}_{t} consist of the torques at each joint. The neural network policies used one hidden layer and soft rectifier nonlinearities of the form a=log⁡(1+exp⁡(z))𝑎1𝑧a=\log(1+\exp(z)). Since these policies use the state as input, they only have a few hundred parameters, far fewer than our visuomotor policies. However, even this number of parameters can pose a major challenge for prior policy search methods (Deisenroth et al., 2013).
items.zh: 在本节中，我们将我们的方法与先前的策略搜索技术在一系列模拟机器人控制任务上进行比较。这些结果之前出现在我们介绍使用局部线性模型的轨迹优化程序的会议论文中（Levine和Abbeel，2014）。在这些任务中，状态𝐱_t由每个机器人的关节角度和速度组成，动作𝐮_t由每个关节的扭矩组成。神经网络策略使用一个隐藏层和形式为a=log(1+exp(z))的软整流非线性函数。由于这些策略使用状态作为输入，它们只有几百个参数，远少于我们的视觉运动策略。然而，即使是这个数量的参数也可能对先前的策略搜索方法构成重大挑战（Deisenroth等人，2013）。

items.en: We simulated 2D and 3D peg insertion, octopus arm control, and planar swimming and walking. The difficulty in the peg insertion tasks stems from the need to align the peg with the slot and the complex contacts between the peg and the walls, which result in discontinuous dynamics. Octopus arm control involves moving the tip of a flexible arm to a goal position (Engel et al., 2005). The challenge in this task stems from its high dimensionality: the arm has 252525 degrees of freedom, corresponding to 505050 state dimensions. The swimming task requires controlling a three-link snake, and the walking task requires a seven-link biped to maintain a target velocity. The challenge in these tasks comes from underactuation. Details of the simulation and cost for each task are in Appendix B.1.
items.zh: 我们模拟了2D和3D的插销插入、章鱼臂控制以及平面游泳和行走。插销插入任务的难度源于需要将插销与槽对齐以及插销与墙壁之间的复杂接触，这导致了不连续的动力学。章鱼臂控制涉及将柔性臂的尖端移动到目标位置（Engel等人，2005）。该任务的挑战在于其高维度：臂有25个自由度，对应50个状态维度。游泳任务需要控制一个三连杆蛇形机器人，而行走任务需要一个七连杆双足机器人维持目标速度。这些任务的挑战来自欠驱动。每个任务的模拟和代价详情见附录B.1。

items.en: We compare to REPS (Peters et al., 2010), reward-weighted regression (RWR) (Peters and Schaal, 2007; Kober and Peters, 2009), the cross-entropy method (CEM) (Rubinstein and Kroese, 2004), and PILCO (Deisenroth and Rasmussen, 2011). We also use iLQG (Li and Todorov, 2004) with a known model as a baseline, shown as a black horizontal line in all plots. REPS is a model-free method that, like our approach, enforces a KL-divergence constraint between the new and old policy. We compare to a variant of REPS that also fits linear dynamics to generate 500 pseudo-samples (Lioutikov et al., 2014), which we label “REPS (20 + 500).” RWR is an EM algorithm that fits the policy to previous samples weighted by the exponential of their reward, and CEM fits the policy to the best samples in each batch. With Gaussian trajectories, CEM and RWR only differ in the weights. These methods represent a class of RL algorithms that fit the policy to weighted samples, including PoWER and PI2 (Kober and Peters, 2009; Theodorou et al., 2010; Stulp and Sigaud, 2012). PILCO is a model-based method that uses a Gaussian process to learn a global dynamics model that is used to optimize the policy. We used the open-source implementation of PILCO provided by the authors. Both REPS and PILCO require solving large nonlinear optimizations at each iteration, while our method does not. Our method used 555 rollouts with the Gaussian mixture model prior, and 202020 without. Due to its computational cost, PILCO was provided with 555 rollouts per iteration, while other prior methods used 202020 and 100100100. For all prior methods with free hyperparameters (such as the fraction of elites for CEM), we performed hyperparameter sweeps and chose the most successful settings for the comparison.
items.zh: 我们与REPS（Peters等人，2010）、奖励加权回归（RWR）（Peters和Schaal，2007；Kober和Peters，2009）、交叉熵方法（CEM）（Rubinstein和Kroese，2004）以及PILCO（Deisenroth和Rasmussen，2011）进行了比较。我们还使用带有已知模型的iLQG（Li和Todorov，2004）作为基线，在所有图中以黑色水平线显示。REPS是一种无模型方法，与我们的方法一样，它在新旧策略之间施加KL散度约束。我们比较了REPS的一个变体，该变体也拟合线性动力学以生成500个伪样本（Lioutikov等人，2014），我们将其标记为“REPS（20 + 500）”。RWR是一种EM算法，它根据先前样本的奖励指数加权来拟合策略，而CEM则根据每批中最好的样本拟合策略。对于高斯轨迹，CEM和RWR仅在权重上有所不同。这些方法代表了一类RL算法，它们将策略拟合到加权样本，包括PoWER和PI2（Kober和Peters，2009；Theodorou等人，2010；Stulp和Sigaud，2012）。PILCO是一种基于模型的方法，它使用高斯过程学习全局动力学模型，用于优化策略。我们使用了作者提供的PILCO开源实现。REPS和PILCO都需要在每次迭代中解决大规模非线性优化问题，而我们的方法则不需要。我们的方法在使用高斯混合模型先验时使用了5次 rollout，不使用则使用20次。由于计算成本高，PILCO每次迭代提供5次 rollout，而其他先前方法使用20次和100次。对于所有具有自由超参数的先前方法（例如CEM的精英比例），我们进行了超参数扫描，并选择了最成功的设置进行比较。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Results for learning linear-Gaussian controllers for 2D and 3D insertion, octopus arm, and swimming. Our approach uses fewer samples and finds better solutions than prior methods, and the GMM further reduces the required sample count. Images in the lower-right show the last time step for each system at several iterations of our method, with red lines indicating end effector trajectories.
items.capZh: 图4：学习2D和3D插入、章鱼臂和游泳的线性高斯控制器的结果。我们的方法使用更少的样本并找到比先前方法更好的解决方案，而GMM进一步减少了所需的样本数量。右下角的图像显示了我们的方法在几次迭代中每个系统的最后一个时间步，红线表示末端执行器轨迹。

items.en: In the first set of comparisons, we evaluate only the trajectory optimization procedure for training linear-Gaussian controllers under unknown dynamics to determine its sample-efficiency and applicability to complex, high-dimensional problems. The results of this comparison for the peg insertion, octopus arm, and swimming tasks appears in Figure 4. The horizontal axis shows the total number of samples, and the vertical axis shows the minimum distance between the end of the peg and the bottom of the slot, the distance to the target for the octopus arm, or the total distance travelled by the swimmer. Since the peg is 0.50.50.5 units long, distances above this amount correspond to controllers that cannot perform an insertion. Our method learned much more effective controllers with fewer samples, especially when using the Gaussian mixture model prior. On 3D insertion, it outperformed the iLQG baseline, which used a known model. Contact discontinuities cause problems for derivative-based methods like iLQG, as well as methods like PILCO that learn a smooth global dynamics model. We use a time-varying local model, which preserves more detail, and fitting the model to samples has a smoothing effect that mitigates discontinuity issues. Prior policy search methods could servo to the hole, but were unable to insert the peg. On the octopus arm, our method succeeded despite the high dimensionality of the state and action spaces.111The high dimensionality of the octopus arm made it difficult to run PILCO, though in principle, such methods should perform well on this task given the arm’s smooth dynamics. Our method also successfully learned a swimming gait, while prior model-free methods could not initiate forward motion. PILCO also learned an effective gait due to the smooth dynamics of this task, but its GP-based optimization required orders of magnitude more computation time than our method, taking about 50 minutes per iteration. In the case of prior model-free methods, the high dimensionality of the time-varying linear-Gaussian controllers likely caused considerable difficulty (Deisenroth et al., 2013), while our approach exploits the structure of linear-Gaussian controllers for efficient learning.
items.zh: 在第一组比较中，我们仅评估了在未知动力学下训练线性高斯控制器的轨迹优化程序，以确定其样本效率和对复杂高维问题的适用性。插销插入、章鱼臂和游泳任务的比较结果如图4所示。横轴表示总样本数，纵轴表示插销末端与槽底之间的最小距离、章鱼臂到目标的距离或游泳者行进的总距离。由于插销长度为0.5个单位，超过此值的距离对应于无法完成插入的控制器。我们的方法用更少的样本学习了更有效的控制器，尤其是在使用高斯混合模型先验时。在3D插入任务中，它优于使用已知模型的iLQG基线。接触不连续性给基于导数的方法（如iLQG）以及学习平滑全局动力学模型的方法（如PILCO）带来了问题。我们使用时变局部模型，保留了更多细节，并且将模型拟合到样本具有平滑效果，减轻了不连续性问题。先前的策略搜索方法可以伺服到孔，但无法插入插销。在章鱼臂任务中，尽管状态和动作空间维度高，我们的方法仍然成功。章鱼臂的高维度使得运行PILCO变得困难，尽管原则上，考虑到臂的平滑动力学，这类方法应该在该任务上表现良好。我们的方法还成功学习了游泳步态，而先前的无模型方法无法启动向前运动。PILCO也由于该任务的平滑动力学学习了有效的步态，但其基于GP的优化需要的计算时间比我们的方法多几个数量级，每次迭代大约需要50分钟。对于先前的无模型方法，时变线性高斯控制器的高维度可能造成了相当大的困难（Deisenroth等人，2013），而我们的方法利用了线性高斯控制器的结构进行高效学习。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Comparison on neural network policies. For insertion, the policy was trained to search for an unknown slot position on four slot positions (shown above). Generalization to new positions is graphed with dashed lines. Note how the end effector (red) follows the surface to find the slot, and how the swimming gait is smoother due to the stationary policy.
items.capZh: 图5：神经网络策略的比较。对于插入任务，策略被训练为在四个插槽位置（如上所示）搜索未知的插槽位置。对新位置的泛化用虚线表示。注意末端执行器（红色）如何沿着表面寻找插槽，以及由于策略是平稳的，游泳步态更加平滑。

items.en: In the second set of comparisons, shown in Figure 5, we compare guided policy search to RWR and CEM222PILCO cannot optimize neural network policies, and we could not obtain reasonable results with REPS. Prior applications of REPS generally focus on simpler, lower-dimensional policy classes (Peters et al., 2010; Lioutikov et al., 2014). on the challenging task of training high-dimensional neural network policies for the peg insertion and locomotion tasks. The variant of guided policy search used in this comparison differs somewhat from the version described in Section 4, in that it used a simpler dual gradient descent formulation, rather than BADMM. In practice, we found the performance of these methods to be very similar, though the BADMM variant was substantially faster and easier to implement.
items.zh: 在第二组比较中，如图5所示，我们将引导策略搜索与RWR和CEM²在训练用于插销插入和运动任务的高维神经网络策略这一具有挑战性的任务上进行了比较。²PILCO无法优化神经网络策略，并且我们无法用REPS获得合理的结果。REPS的先前应用通常集中在更简单、更低维的策略类别上（Peters等人，2010；Lioutikov等人，2014）。本比较中使用的引导策略搜索变体与第4节描述的版本略有不同，因为它使用了更简单的对偶梯度下降公式，而不是BADMM。在实践中，我们发现这些方法的性能非常相似，尽管BADMM变体明显更快且更容易实现。

items.en: On swimming, our method achieved similar performance to the linear-Gaussian case, but since the neural network policy was stationary, the resulting gait was much smoother. Previous methods could only solve this task with 100100100 samples per iteration, with RWR eventually obtaining a distance of 0.5m after 4000 samples, and CEM reaching 2.1m after 3000. Our method was able to reach such distances with many fewer samples. Following prior work (Levine and Koltun, 2013a), the walker trajectory was initialized from a demonstration, which was stabilized with simple linear feedback. The RWR and CEM policies were initialized with samples from this controller to provide a fair comparison. The graph shows the average distance travelled on rollouts that did not fall, and shows that only our method was able to learn walking policies that succeeded consistently.
items.zh: 在游泳任务上，我们的方法实现了与线性高斯情况相似的性能，但由于神经网络策略是平稳的，产生的步态更加平滑。先前的方法只能以每次迭代100个样本解决此任务，RWR最终在4000个样本后获得0.5米的距离，CEM在3000个样本后达到2.1米。我们的方法能够用更少的样本达到这样的距离。根据先前的工作（Levine和Koltun，2013a），行走轨迹从演示初始化，并通过简单的线性反馈进行稳定。RWR和CEM策略使用来自该控制器的样本进行初始化，以提供公平的比较。图表显示了在未跌倒的 rollout 中行进的平均距离，并且表明只有我们的方法能够学习到一致成功的行走策略。

items.en: On peg insertion, the neural network was trained to insert the peg without precise knowledge of the position of the hole, resulting in a partially observed problem. The holes were placed in a region of radius 0.2 units in 2D and 0.1 units in 3D. The policies were trained on four different hole positions, and then tested on four new hole positions to evaluate generalization. The hole position was not provided to the neural network, and the policies therefore had to search for the hole, with only joint angles and velocities as input. Only our method could acquire a successful strategy to locate both the training and test holes, although RWR was eventually able to insert the peg into one of the four holes in 2D.
items.zh: 在插销插入任务上，神经网络被训练为在没有精确孔位置信息的情况下插入插销，导致部分可观测问题。孔被放置在2D中半径为0.2个单位、3D中半径为0.1个单位的区域内。策略在四个不同的孔位置上进行训练，然后在四个新的孔位置上进行测试以评估泛化能力。孔位置未提供给神经网络，因此策略必须仅以关节角度和速度作为输入来搜索孔。只有我们的方法能够获得成功定位训练和测试孔的策略，尽管RWR最终能够在2D中将插销插入四个孔之一。

items.en: These comparisons show that training even medium-sized neural network policies for continuous control tasks with a limited number of samples is very difficult for many prior policy search algorithms. Indeed, it is generally known that model-free policy search methods struggle with policies that have over 100 parameters (Deisenroth et al., 2013). In subsequent sections, we will evaluate our method on real robotic tasks, showing that it can scale from these simulated tasks all the way up to end-to-end learning of visuomotor control.
items.zh: 这些比较表明，对于许多先前的策略搜索算法来说，在样本数量有限的情况下训练用于连续控制任务的中等规模神经网络策略非常困难。事实上，众所周知，无模型策略搜索方法在处理超过100个参数的策略时会遇到困难（Deisenroth等人，2013）。在后续章节中，我们将在真实机器人任务上评估我们的方法，展示它可以从这些模拟任务扩展到视觉运动控制的端到端学习。

full.sec: 6.2 Learning Linear-Gaussian Controllers on a PR2 Robot
full.secZh: 6.2 在PR2机器人上学习线性高斯控制器

items.capEn: Figure 6: Tasks for linear-Gaussian controller evaluation: (a) stacking lego blocks on a fixed base, (b) onto a free-standing block, (c) held in both gripper; (d) threading wooden rings onto a peg; (e) attaching the wheels to a toy airplane; (f) inserting a shoe tree into a shoe; (g,h) screwing caps onto pill bottles and (i) onto a water bottle.
items.capZh: 图6：线性高斯控制器评估任务：（a）在固定底座上堆叠乐高积木，（b）堆叠到独立积木上，（c）用两个夹爪夹持；（d）将木环穿到柱子上；（e）将轮子安装到玩具飞机上；（f）将鞋楦插入鞋中；（g,h）将盖子拧到药瓶上以及（i）拧到水瓶上。

items.en: In this section, we demonstrate the range of manipulation tasks that can be learned using our trajectory optimization algorithm on a real PR2 robot. These experiments previously appeared in our conference paper on guided policy search (Levine et al., 2015). Since performing trajectory optimization is a prerequisite for guided policy search to learn effective visuomotor policies, it is important to evaluate that our trajectory optimization can learn a wide variety of robotic manipulation tasks under unknown dynamics. The tasks in these experiments are shown in Figure 6, while Figure 7 shows the learning curves for each task. For all robotic experiments in this article, the tasks were learned entirely from scratch,
items.zh: 在本节中，我们展示了使用我们的轨迹优化算法在真实PR2机器人上可以学习的一系列操作任务。这些实验之前出现在我们关于引导策略搜索的会议论文中（Levine等人，2015）。由于执行轨迹优化是引导策略搜索学习有效视觉运动策略的先决条件，因此评估我们的轨迹优化是否能够在未知动力学下学习各种机器人操作任务非常重要。这些实验中的任务如图6所示，而图7显示了每个任务的学习曲线。对于本文中的所有机器人实验，任务都是从零开始学习的，

items.capEn: Figure 7: Distance to target point during training of linear-Gaussian controllers. The actual target may differ due to perturbations. Error bars indicate one standard deviation.
items.capZh: 图7：训练线性高斯控制器期间到目标点的距离。由于扰动，实际目标可能不同。误差线表示一个标准差。

items.en: with the initialization of the controllers p​(𝐮t|𝐱t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) described in Appendix B.2. The number of samples required to learn each controller is around 20-25, substantially lower than many prior policy search methods in the literature (Peters and Schaal, 2008; Kober et al., 2010b; Theodorou et al., 2010; Deisenroth et al., 2013). Total learning time was about ten minutes for each task, of which only 3-4 minutes involved system interaction. The rest of the time was spent resetting the robot to the initial state and on computation.
items.zh: 控制器的初始化p(𝐮_t|𝐱_t)在附录B.2中描述。学习每个控制器所需的样本数量约为20-25个，远低于文献中许多先前的策略搜索方法（Peters和Schaal，2008；Kober等人，2010b；Theodorou等人，2010；Deisenroth等人，2013）。每个任务的总学习时间约为十分钟，其中只有3-4分钟涉及系统交互。其余时间用于将机器人重置到初始状态和计算。

items.en: The linear-Gaussian controllers are optimized for a specific condition – e.g., a specific position of the target lego block. To evaluate their robustness to errors in the specified target position, we conducted experiments on the lego block and ring tasks where the target object (the lower block and the peg) was perturbed at each trial during training, and then tested with various perturbations. For each task, controllers were trained with Gaussian perturbations with standard deviations of 00, 111, and 222 cm in the position of the target object, and each controller was tested with perturbations of radius 00, 111, 222, and 333 cm. Note that with a radius of 222 cm, the peg would be placed about one ring-width away from the expected position. The results are shown in Table 2. All controllers were robust to perturbations of 111 cm, and would often succeed at 222 cm. Robustness increased slightly when more noise was injected during training, but even controllers trained without noise exhibited considerable robustness, since the linear-Gaussian controllers themselves add noise during sampling. We also evaluated a kinematic baseline for each perturbation level, which planned a straight path from a point 5 cm above the target to the expected (unperturbed) target location. This baseline was only able to place the lego block in the absence of perturbations. The rounded top of the peg provided an easier condition for the baseline, with occasional successes at higher perturbation levels. Our controllers outperformed the baseline by a wide margin.
items.zh: 线性高斯控制器针对特定条件进行优化——例如，目标乐高积木的特定位置。为了评估它们对指定目标位置误差的鲁棒性，我们在乐高积木和环任务上进行了实验，其中目标物体（下积木和柱子）在训练过程中每次试验都受到扰动，然后在各种扰动下进行测试。对于每个任务，控制器使用目标物体位置的标准差为0、1和2厘米的高斯扰动进行训练，并且每个控制器在半径为0、1、2和3厘米的扰动下进行测试。请注意，在半径为2厘米时，柱子将被放置在距离预期位置大约一个环宽的位置。结果如表2所示。所有控制器对1厘米的扰动都具有鲁棒性，并且通常在2厘米时也能成功。当训练过程中注入更多噪声时，鲁棒性略有增加，但即使在没有噪声的情况下训练的控制器也表现出相当大的鲁棒性，因为线性高斯控制器本身在采样过程中会添加噪声。我们还针对每个扰动水平评估了运动学基线，该基线规划了一条从目标上方5厘米的点到预期（未扰动）目标位置的直线路径。该基线只能在没有扰动的情况下放置乐高积木。柱子的圆形顶部为基线提供了更有利的条件，在更高的扰动水平下偶尔成功。我们的控制器以很大的优势优于基线。

items.en: All of the robotic experiments discussed in this section may be viewed in the corresponding supplementary video, available online: http://rll.berkeley.edu/icra2015gps. A video illustration of the visuomotor policies, discussed in the following sections, is also available: http://sites.google.com/site/visuomotorpolicy.
items.zh: 本节讨论的所有机器人实验都可以在相应的补充视频中观看，网址为：http://rll.berkeley.edu/icra2015gps。关于视觉运动策略的视频说明（在以下章节中讨论）也可在以下网址获得：http://sites.google.com/site/visuomotorpolicy。

items.en: In this section, we evaluate the neural network architecture that we propose in Section 5.1 in comparison to more standard convolutional networks. To isolate the architectures from other confounding factors, we measure their accuracy on the pose estimation pretraining task described in Section 5.2. This is a reasonable proxy for evaluating how well the network can overcome two major challenges in visuomotor learning: the ability to handle relatively small datasets without overfitting, and the capability to learn tasks that are inherently spatial. We compare to a network where the expectation operator after the softmax is replaced with a learned fully connected layer, as is standard in the literature, a network where both the softmax and the expectation operators are replaced with a fully connected layer, and a version of this network that also uses 3×3333\times 3 max pooling with stride 222 at the first two layers. These alternative architectures have many more parameters, since the fully connected layer takes the entire bank of response maps from the third convolutional layer as input. Pooling helps to reduce the number of parameters, but not to the same degree as the spatial softmax and expectation operators in our architecture.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们评估了我们在第5.1节中提出的神经网络架构，并与更标准的卷积网络进行比较。为了将架构与其他混淆因素隔离开来，我们测量了它们在第5.2节描述的位姿估计预训练任务上的准确性。这是评估网络克服视觉运动学习中两个主要挑战的合理代理：处理相对较小的数据集而不发生过拟合的能力，以及学习固有空间任务的能力。我们与一个网络进行比较，其中softmax后的期望算子被替换为学习的全连接层（如文献中标准做法），一个网络其中softmax和期望算子都被替换为全连接层，以及该网络的一个版本，该版本还在前两层使用步长为2的3×3最大池化。这些替代架构具有更多的参数，因为全连接层将第三卷积层的整个响应图库作为输入。池化有助于减少参数数量，但程度不如我们架构中的空间softmax和期望算子。

items.en: The results in Table 3 indicate that using the softmax and expectation operators improves pose estimation accuracy substantially. Our network is able to outperform the more standard architectures because it is forced by the softmax and expectation operators to learn feature points, which provide a concise representation suitable for spatial inference. Since most of the parameters in this architecture are in the convolutional layers, which benefit from extensive weight sharing, overfitting is also greatly reduced. By removing pooling, our network also maintains higher resolution in the convolutional layers, improving spatial accuracy. Although we did attempt to regularize the larger standard architectures with higher weight decay and dropout, we did not observe a significant improvement on this dataset. We also did not extensively optimize the parameters of this network, such as filter size and number of channels, and investigating these design decisions further would be valuable to investigate in future work.
items.zh: 表3中的结果表明，使用softmax和期望算子显著提高了位姿估计的准确性。我们的网络能够优于更标准的架构，因为它通过softmax和期望算子被迫学习特征点，这提供了适合空间推理的简洁表示。由于该架构中的大部分参数位于卷积层中，这些层受益于广泛的权重共享，因此过拟合也大大减少。通过移除池化，我们的网络还在卷积层中保持了更高的分辨率，提高了空间精度。尽管我们尝试通过更高的权重衰减和dropout来正则化更大的标准架构，但我们没有观察到在该数据集上有显著改善。我们也没有广泛优化该网络的参数，例如滤波器大小和通道数，进一步研究这些设计决策将值得在未来工作中进行。

full.secZh: 6.4 深度视觉运动策略评估

items.en: In this section, we present an evaluation of our full visuomotor policy training algorithm on a PR2 robot. The aim of this evaluation is to answer the following question: does training the perception and control systems in a visuomotor policy jointly end-to-end provide better performance than training each component separately?
items.zh: 在本节中，我们展示了在PR2机器人上对我们的完整视觉运动策略训练算法的评估。该评估的目的是回答以下问题：在视觉运动策略中联合端到端训练感知和控制系统是否比单独训练每个组件提供更好的性能？

items.capEn: Figure 8: Illustration of the tasks in our visuomotor policy experiments, showing the variation in the position of the target for the hanger, cube, and bottle tasks, as well as two of the three grasps for the hammer, which also included variation in position (not shown).
items.capZh: 图8：视觉运动策略实验中的任务示意图，展示了衣架、方块和瓶子任务中目标位置的变化，以及锤子任务中三种抓取方式中的两种（位置变化未显示）。

items.en: We trained policies for hanging a coat hanger on a clothes rack, inserting a block into a shape sorting cube, fitting the claw of a toy hammer under a nail with various grasps, and screwing on a bottle cap. The cost function for these tasks encourages low distance between three points on the end-effector and corresponding target points, low torques, and, for the bottle task, spinning the wrist. The equations for these cost functions and the details of each task are presented in Appendix B.2. The tasks are illustrated in Figure 8. Each task involved variation of 10-20 cm in each direction in the position of the target object (the rack, shape sorting cube, nail, and bottle). In addition, the coat hanger and hammer tasks were trained with two and three grasps, respectively. The current angle of the grasp was not provided to the policy, but had to be inferred from observing the robot’s gripper in the camera images. All tasks used the same policy architecture and model parameters.
items.zh: 我们训练了将衣架挂上衣架、将方块插入形状分类立方体、用各种抓取方式将玩具锤的爪子对准钉子以及拧上瓶盖的策略。这些任务的代价函数鼓励末端执行器上的三个点与对应目标点之间的距离小、扭矩小，并且对于瓶子任务，鼓励手腕旋转。这些代价函数的方程和每个任务的细节见附录B.2。任务如图8所示。每个任务中目标物体（衣架、形状分类立方体、钉子和瓶子）的位置在每个方向上有10-20厘米的变化。此外，衣架和锤子任务分别使用两种和三种抓取方式训练。抓取当前角度未提供给策略，必须通过观察摄像头图像中的机器人夹爪来推断。所有任务使用相同的策略架构和模型参数。

items.en: We evaluated the visuomotor policies in three conditions: (1) the training target positions and grasps, (2) new target positions not seen during training and, for the hammer, new grasps (spatial test), and (3) training positions with visual distractors (visual test). A selection of these experiments is shown in the supplementary video.333The video can be viewed at http://sites.google.com/site/visuomotorpolicy For the visual test, the shape sorting cube was placed on a table rather than held in the gripper, the coat hanger was placed on a rack with clothes, and the bottle and hammer tasks were done in the presence of clutter. Illustrations of this test are shown in Figure 9.
items.zh: 我们在三种条件下评估了视觉运动策略：（1）训练目标位置和抓取方式；（2）训练中未见的新目标位置，以及锤子的新抓取方式（空间测试）；（3）带有视觉干扰物的训练位置（视觉测试）。这些实验的精选结果见补充视频。333视频可在 http://sites.google.com/site/visuomotorpolicy 观看。在视觉测试中，形状分类立方体被放在桌子上而非夹爪中，衣架被放在有衣服的衣架上，瓶子和锤子任务在有杂物的环境中进行。该测试的示意图如图9所示。

items.en: The success rates for each test are shown in Figure 9. We compared to two baselines, both of which train the vision layers in advance for pose prediction, instead of training the entire policy end-to-end. The features baseline discards the last layer of the pose predictor and uses the feature points, resulting in the same architecture as our policy, while the prediction baseline feeds the predicted pose into the control layers. The pose prediction baseline is analogous to a standard modular approach to policy learning, where the vision system is first trained to localize the target, and the policy is trained on top of it. This variant achieves poor performance. As discussed in Section 6.3, the pose estimate is accurate to about 1 cm. However, unlike the tasks in Section 6.2, where robust controllers could succeed even with inaccurate perception, many of these tasks have tolerances of just a few millimeters. In fact, the pose prediction baseline is only successful on the coat hanger, which requires comparatively little accuracy. Millimeter accuracy is difficult to achieve even with calibrated cameras and checkerboards. Indeed, prior work has reported that the PR2 can maintain a camera to end effector accuracy of about 2 cm during open loop motion (Meeussen et al., 2010). This suggests that the failure of this baseline is not atypical, and that our visuomotor policies are learning visual features and control strategies that improve the robot’s accuracy. When provided with pose estimation features, the policy has more freedom in how it uses the visual information, and achieves somewhat higher success rates. However, full end-to-end training performs significantly better, achieving high accuracy even on the challenging bottle task, and successfully adapting to the variety of grasps on the hammer task. This suggests that, although the vision layer pretraining is clearly beneficial for reducing computation time, it is not sufficient by itself for discovering good features for visuomotor policies.
items.zh: 每次测试的成功率如图9所示。我们比较了两个基线方法，两者都预先训练视觉层用于姿态预测，而不是端到端训练整个策略。特征基线丢弃姿态预测器的最后一层并使用特征点，得到与我们的策略相同的架构，而预测基线将预测的姿态输入控制层。姿态预测基线类似于策略学习的标准模块化方法，即先训练视觉系统定位目标，然后在其上训练策略。该变体性能较差。如第6.3节所述，姿态估计精度约为1厘米。然而，与第6.2节的任务不同，那些任务中鲁棒控制器即使感知不准确也能成功，而许多这些任务的公差仅为几毫米。事实上，姿态预测基线仅在衣架任务上成功，该任务对精度要求相对较低。即使使用校准相机和棋盘格，毫米级精度也难以实现。事实上，先前工作报告PR2在开环运动中相机到末端执行器的精度约为2厘米（Meeussen等人，2010）。这表明该基线的失败并非特例，而我们的视觉运动策略正在学习提高机器人精度的视觉特征和控制策略。当提供姿态估计特征时，策略在使用视觉信息方面有更多自由度，并取得了较高的成功率。然而，完全端到端训练表现显著更好，即使在具有挑战性的瓶子任务上也实现了高精度，并成功适应了锤子任务中的多种抓取方式。这表明，尽管视觉层预训练明显有利于减少计算时间，但仅凭它不足以发现视觉运动策略的良好特征。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Training and visual test scenes as seen by the policy (left), and experimental results (right). The hammer and bottle images were cropped for visualization only.
items.capZh: 图9：策略看到的训练和视觉测试场景（左）及实验结果（右）。锤子和瓶子图像仅为了可视化而裁剪。

items.en: The policies exhibit moderate tolerance to distractors that are visually separated from the target object. This is enabled in part by the spatial softmax, which has a lateral inhibition effect that suppresses non-maximal activations. Since distractors are unlikely to activate each feature as much as the true object, their activations are therefore suppressed. However, as expected, the learned policies tend to perform poorly under drastic changes to the backdrop, or when the distractors are adjacent to or occluding the manipulated objects, as shown in the supplementary video. A standard solution to this issue to expose the policy to a greater variety of visual situations during training. This issue could also be mitigated by artificially augmenting the image samples with synthetic transformations, as discussed in prior work in computer vision (Simard et al., 2003), or even incorporating ideas from transfer and semi-supervised learning.
items.zh: 策略对与目标物体视觉分离的干扰物表现出中等容忍度。这在一定程度上得益于空间softmax，它具有侧抑制效应，可抑制非最大激活。由于干扰物不太可能像真实物体那样激活每个特征，因此它们的激活被抑制。然而，正如预期，当背景发生剧烈变化，或干扰物邻近或遮挡操作对象时，学习到的策略往往表现不佳，如补充视频所示。解决此问题的标准方法是在训练期间让策略接触更多样化的视觉情况。通过人工图像样本的合成变换（如计算机视觉先前工作中所述，Simard等人，2003），甚至结合迁移学习和半监督学习的思想，也可以缓解此问题。

full.secZh: 6.5 端到端训练学习的特征

items.capEn: Figure 10: Feature points tracked by the policy during task execution for each of the four tasks. Each feature point is displayed in a different random color, with consistent coloring across images. The policy finds features on the target object and the robot gripper and arm. In the bottle cap task, note that the policy correctly ignores the distractor bottle in the background, even though it was not present during training.
items.capZh: 图10：策略在四个任务执行过程中跟踪的特征点。每个特征点以不同的随机颜色显示，并在图像间保持颜色一致。策略在目标物体和机器人夹爪及手臂上找到特征点。在瓶盖任务中，注意策略正确忽略了背景中的干扰瓶子，尽管它在训练中未出现。

items.en: The visual processing layers of our architecture automatically learn features points using the spatial softmax and expectation operators. These feature points encapsulate all of the visual information received by the motor layers of the policy. In Figure 10, we show the features points discovered by our visuomotor policy through guided policy search. Each policy learns features on the target object and the robot manipulator, both clearly relevant to task execution. The policy tends to pick out robust, distinctive features on the objects, such as the left pole of the clothes rack, the left corners of the shape-sorting cube and the bottom-left corner of the toy tool bench. In the bottle task, the end-to-end trained policy outputs points on both sides of the bottle, including one on the cap, while the pose prediction network only finds points on the right edge of the bottle.
items.zh: 我们架构的视觉处理层使用空间softmax和期望算子自动学习特征点。这些特征点封装了策略运动层接收的所有视觉信息。在图10中，我们展示了通过引导策略搜索发现的视觉运动策略的特征点。每个策略在目标物体和机器人操作器上学习特征，两者都与任务执行明确相关。策略倾向于挑选物体上鲁棒、独特的特征，例如衣架的左杆、形状分类立方体的左角和玩具工具台的左下角。在瓶子任务中，端到端训练的策略在瓶子两侧输出点，包括一个在瓶盖上，而姿态预测网络仅在瓶子右边缘找到点。

items.en: In Figure 11, we compare the feature points learned through guided policy search to those learned by a CNN trained for pose prediction. After end-to-end training, the policy acquired a distinctly different set of feature points compared to the pose prediction CNN used for initialization. The end-to-end trained model finds more feature points on task-relevant objects and fewer points on background objects. This suggests that the policy improves its performance by acquiring goal-driven visual features that differ from those learned for object localization.
items.zh: 在图11中，我们将通过引导策略搜索学习的特征点与为姿态预测训练的CNN学习的特征点进行比较。端到端训练后，策略获得了一组与用于初始化的姿态预测CNN明显不同的特征点。端到端训练的模型在任务相关物体上找到更多特征点，在背景物体上找到更少。这表明策略通过获取目标驱动的视觉特征来提高性能，这些特征不同于为物体定位学习的特征。

items.en: The feature point representation is very simple, since it assumes that the learned features are present at all times, and only one instance of each feature is ever present in the image. While this is a drastic simplification, both the pose predictor and the policy still achieve good results. A more flexible architecture that still learns a concise feature point representation could further improve policy performance. We hope to explore this in future work.
items.zh: 特征点表示非常简单，因为它假设学习到的特征始终存在，并且每个特征在图像中只出现一个实例。尽管这是一个极大的简化，但姿态预测器和策略仍然取得了良好的结果。一种更灵活的架构，仍然学习简洁的特征点表示，可以进一步提高策略性能。我们希望在未来的工作中探索这一点。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Feature points learned for each task. For each input image, the feature points produced by the policy are shown in blue, while the feature points of the pose prediction network are shown in red. The end-to-end trained policy tends to discover more feature points on the target object and the robot arm than the pose prediction network.
items.capZh: 图11：每个任务学习到的特征点。对于每个输入图像，策略产生的特征点以蓝色显示，而姿态预测网络的特征点以红色显示。端到端训练的策略倾向于在目标物体和机器人手臂上发现比姿态预测网络更多的特征点。

items.en: We used the Caffe deep learning library (Jia et al., 2014) for CNN training. Each visuomotor policy required a total of 3-4 hours of training time: 20-30 minutes for the pose prediction data collection on the robot, 40-60 minutes for the fully observed trajectory pretraining on the robot and offline pose pretraining (which can be done in parallel), and between 1.5 and 2.5 hours for end-to-end training with guided policy search. The coat hanger task required two iterations of guided policy search, the shape sorting cube and the hammer required three, and the bottle task required four. Only about 15 minutes of the training time consisted of executing trials on the robot. Since training was dominated by computation, we expect significant speedup from a more efficient implementation. The number of samples for training each policy is shown in Table 4. Each trial was five seconds in length, and the numbers do not include the time needed to collect about 1000 images for pretraining the visual processing layers of the policy.
items.zh: 我们使用Caffe深度学习库（Jia等人，2014）进行CNN训练。每个视觉运动策略总共需要3-4小时的训练时间：20-30分钟用于在机器人上收集姿态预测数据，40-60分钟用于在机器人上完全观测轨迹预训练和离线姿态预训练（可并行进行），以及1.5到2.5小时用于端到端训练与引导策略搜索。衣架任务需要两次引导策略搜索迭代，形状分类立方体和锤子需要三次，瓶子任务需要四次。训练时间中只有约15分钟是在机器人上执行试验。由于训练以计算为主，我们期望通过更高效的实现获得显著加速。训练每个策略的样本数见表4。每次试验持续5秒，这些数字不包括收集约1000张图像用于预训练策略视觉处理层所需的时间。

items.en: In this paper, we presented a method for learning robotic control policies that use raw input from a monocular camera. These policies are represented by a novel convolutional neural network architecture, and can be trained end-to-end using our guided policy search algorithm, which decomposes the policy search problem in a trajectory optimization phase that uses full state information and a supervised learning phase that only uses the observations. This decomposition allows us to leverage state-of-the-art tools from supervised learning, making it straightforward to optimize extremely high-dimensional policies. Our experimental results show that our method can execute complex manipulation skills, and that end-to-end training produces significant improvements in policy performance compared to using fixed vision layers trained for pose prediction.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种学习使用单目相机原始输入的机器人控制策略的方法。这些策略由一种新颖的卷积神经网络架构表示，并且可以使用我们的引导策略搜索算法进行端到端训练，该算法将策略搜索问题分解为使用完整状态信息的轨迹优化阶段和仅使用观测的监督学习阶段。这种分解使我们能够利用监督学习的最先进工具，从而轻松优化极高维度的策略。我们的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以执行复杂的操作技能，并且与使用为姿态预测训练的固定视觉层相比，端到端训练显著提高了策略性能。

items.en: Although we demonstrate moderate generalization over variations in the scene, our current method does not generalize to dramatically different settings, especially when visual distractors occlude the manipulated object or break up its silhouette in ways that differ from the training. The success of CNNs on exceedingly challenging vision tasks suggests that this class of models is capable of learning invariance to irrelevant distractor features (LeCun et al., 2015), and in principle this issue can be addressed by training the policy in a variety of environments, though this poses certain logistical challenges. More practical alternatives that could be explored in future work include simultaneously training the policy on multiple robots, each of which is located in a different environment, developing more sophisticated regularization and pretraining techniques to avoid overfitting, and introducing artificial data augmentation to encourage the policy to be invariant to irrelevant clutter. However, even without these improvements, our method has numerous applications in, for example, an industrial setting where the robot must repeatedly and efficiently perform a task that requires visual feedback under moderate variation in background and clutter conditions.
items.zh: 尽管我们展示了在场景变化上的中等泛化能力，但我们当前的方法不能泛化到显著不同的设置，特别是当视觉干扰物遮挡操作对象或以不同于训练的方式破坏其轮廓时。CNN在极具挑战性的视觉任务上的成功表明，这类模型能够学习对无关干扰特征的不变性（LeCun等人，2015），原则上可以通过在多种环境中训练策略来解决此问题，尽管这带来了一些后勤挑战。未来工作中可以探索的更实用的替代方案包括：同时在多个机器人上训练策略，每个机器人位于不同的环境中；开发更复杂的正则化和预训练技术以避免过拟合；以及引入人工数据增强以鼓励策略对无关杂波具有不变性。然而，即使没有这些改进，我们的方法也有许多应用，例如在工业环境中，机器人必须在背景和杂波条件适度变化的情况下重复且高效地执行需要视觉反馈的任务。

items.en: Our method takes advantage of a known, fully observed state space during training. This is both a weakness and a strength. It allows us to train linear-Gaussian controllers for guided policy search using a very small number of samples, far more efficiently than standard policy search methods. However, the requirement to observe the full state during training limits the tasks to which the method can be applied. In many cases, this limitation is minor, and the only “instrumentation” required at training is to position the objects in the scene at consistent positions. However, tasks that require, for example, manipulating freely moving objects require more extensive instrumentation, such as motion capture. A promising direction for addressing this limitation is to combine our method with unsupervised state-space learning, as proposed in several recent works, including our own (Lange et al., 2012; Watter et al., 2015; Finn et al., 2015).
items.zh: 我们的方法在训练期间利用了已知的、完全观测的状态空间。这既是弱点也是优势。它使我们能够使用非常少的样本训练用于引导策略搜索的线性高斯控制器，效率远高于标准策略搜索方法。然而，在训练期间观测完整状态的要求限制了该方法可应用的任务。在许多情况下，这种限制是次要的，训练所需的唯一“仪器”是将场景中的物体放置在一致的位置。然而，需要操作自由移动物体的任务则需要更广泛的仪器，例如运动捕捉。解决此限制的一个有希望的方向是将我们的方法与无监督状态空间学习相结合，如最近几项工作（包括我们自己的）所提出的（Lange等人，2012；Watter等人，2015；Finn等人，2015）。

items.en: In future work, we hope to explore more complex policy architectures, such as recurrent policies that can deal with extensive occlusions by keeping a memory of past observations. We also hope to extend our method to a wider range of tasks that can benefit from visual input, as well as a variety of other rich sensory modalities, including haptic input from pressure sensors and auditory input. With a wider range of sensory modalities, end-to-end training of sensorimotor policies will become increasingly important: while it is often straightforward to imagine how vision might help to localize the position of an object in the scene, it is much less apparent how sound can be integrated into robotic control. A learned sensorimotor policy would be able to naturally integrate a wide range of modalities and utilize them to directly aid in control.
items.zh: 在未来的工作中，我们希望探索更复杂的策略架构，例如能够通过保留过去观测的记忆来处理大量遮挡的循环策略。我们还希望将我们的方法扩展到更广泛的可受益于视觉输入的任务，以及各种其他丰富的感官模态，包括来自压力传感器的触觉输入和听觉输入。随着感官模态范围的扩大，传感器运动策略的端到端训练将变得越来越重要：虽然通常很容易想象视觉如何帮助定位场景中物体的位置，但声音如何集成到机器人控制中则不那么明显。学习到的传感器运动策略将能够自然地集成多种模态，并直接利用它们辅助控制。

We use a step size of α=0.1𝛼0.1\alpha=0.1 in all of our experiments, which we found to be more stable than α=1.0𝛼1.0\alpha=1.0. The weights νtsubscript𝜈𝑡

The weights νtsubscript𝜈𝑡
u_{t} corresponding to time steps where the KL-divergence is higher than the average are increased by a factor of 2, and the weights corresponding to time steps where the KL-divergence is two standard deviations or more below the average are decreased by a factor of 2. The rationale behind this schedule is to adjust the KL-divergence penalty to keep the policy and trajectory in agreement by roughly the same amount at all time steps. Increasing νtsubscript𝜈𝑡
u_{t} too quickly can lead to the policy and trajectory becoming “locked” together, which makes it difficult for the trajectory to decrease its cost, while leaving it too low requires more iterations for convergence. We found this schedule to work well across all tasks, both during trajectory pretraining and while training the visuomotor policy.

In this section, we describe how these dynamics are fitted. As in Section 4, we drop the subscript i𝑖i, since the dynamics are fitted the same way for all of the trajectory distributions.

items.en: The linear-Gaussian dynamics are defined as p​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)=𝒩​(f𝐱​t​𝐱t+f𝐮​t​𝐮t+fc​t,𝐅t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡𝒩subscript𝑓𝐱𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝑓𝐮𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝑓𝑐𝑡subscript𝐅𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t})=\mathcal{N}(f_{\mathbf{x}t}\mathbf{x}_{t}+f_{\mathbf{u}t}\mathbf{u}_{t}+f_{ct},\mathbf{F}_{t}), and the data that we obtain from the robot can be viewed as tuples {𝐱ti,𝐮ti,𝐱t+1i}superscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡𝑖superscriptsubscript𝐮𝑡𝑖superscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡1𝑖\{\mathbf{x}_{t}^{i},\mathbf{u}_{t}^{i},\mathbf{x}_{t+1}^{i}\}. A simple way to fit these linear-Gaussian dynamics is to use linear regression to determine f𝐱subscript𝑓𝐱f_{\mathbf{x}}, f𝐮subscript𝑓𝐮f_{\mathbf{u}}, and fcsubscript𝑓𝑐f_{c}, and fit 𝐅tsubscript𝐅𝑡\mathbf{F}_{t} based on the errors. However, the sample complexity of linear regression scales with the dimensionality of 𝐱tsubscript𝐱𝑡\mathbf{x}_{t}. For a high-dimensional robotic system, we might need an impractically large number of samples at each iteration to obtain a good fit. However, we can observe that the dynamics at nearby time steps are strongly correlated, and we can dramatically reduce the sample complexity of the dynamics fitting by bringing in information from other time steps, and even prior iterations. We will bring in this information by fitting a global model to all of the transitions {𝐱ti,𝐮ti,𝐱t+1i}superscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡𝑖superscriptsubscript𝐮𝑡𝑖superscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡1𝑖\{\mathbf{x}_{t}^{i},\mathbf{u}_{t}^{i},\mathbf{x}_{t+1}^{i}\} for all t𝑡t and all tuples from several prior iterations (we use three prior iterations in our implementation), and then use this model as a prior for fitting the dynamics at each time step. Note that this global model does not itself need to be a good forward dynamics model – it just needs to serve as a good prior to reduce the sample complexity of linear regression.
items.zh: 线性高斯动力学定义为 p(xt+1|xt,ut)=N(fxt xt + fut ut + fct, Ft)，我们从机器人获得的数据可以视为元组 {xti, uti, xt+1i}。拟合这些线性高斯动力学的一种简单方法是使用线性回归确定 fx、fu 和 fc，并根据误差拟合 Ft。然而，线性回归的样本复杂度随 xt 的维度缩放。对于高维机器人系统，我们可能需要在每次迭代中使用不切实际的大量样本才能获得良好的拟合。然而，我们可以观察到，相邻时间步的动力学是强相关的，通过引入来自其他时间步甚至先前迭代的信息，我们可以显著降低动力学拟合的样本复杂度。我们将通过拟合一个全局模型到所有时间步 t 以及来自几个先前迭代（在我们的实现中使用三个先前迭代）的所有元组 {xti, uti, xt+1i} 来引入这些信息，然后将该模型作为拟合每个时间步动力学的先验。注意，这个全局模型本身不需要是一个好的前向动力学模型——它只需要作为一个好的先验来降低线性回归的样本复杂度。

items.en: To make it more convenient to incorporate a data-driven prior, we will first reformulate this linear regression fit and view it as fitting a Gaussian model to the dataset {𝐱ti,𝐮ti,𝐱t+1i}superscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡𝑖superscriptsubscript𝐮𝑡𝑖superscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡1𝑖\{\mathbf{x}_{t}^{i},\mathbf{u}_{t}^{i},\mathbf{x}_{t+1}^{i}\} at each time step t𝑡t, and then conditioning this Gaussian to obtain p​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}). While this is equivalent to linear regression, it allows us to easily incorporate a normal-inverse-Wishart prior on this Gaussian in order to bring in prior information. Let Σ^^Σ\hat{\Sigma} be the empirical covariance of our dataset, and let μ^^𝜇\hat{\mu} be the empirical mean. The normal-inverse-Wishart prior is defined by prior parameters 𝚽𝚽\mathbf{\Phi}, μ0subscript𝜇0\mu_{0}, m𝑚m, and n0subscript𝑛0n_{0}. Under this prior, the maximum a posteriori estimates for the covariance ΣΣ\Sigma and mean μ𝜇\mu are given by

items.en: Having obtained ΣΣ\Sigma and μ𝜇\mu, we can obtain an estimate of the dynamics p​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t}) by conditioning the distribution 𝒩​(μ,Σ)𝒩𝜇Σ\mathcal{N}(\mu,\Sigma) on [𝐱t;𝐮t]subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡[\mathbf{x}_{t};\mathbf{u}_{t}], which produces linear-Gaussian dynamics p​(𝐱t+1|𝐱t,𝐮t)=𝒩​(f𝐱​t​𝐱t+f𝐮​t​𝐮t+fc​t,𝐅t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝐱𝑡1subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡𝒩subscript𝑓𝐱𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡subscript𝑓𝐮𝑡subscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝑓𝑐𝑡subscript𝐅𝑡p(\mathbf{x}_{t+1}|\mathbf{x}_{t},\mathbf{u}_{t})=\mathcal{N}(f_{\mathbf{x}t}\mathbf{x}_{t}+f_{\mathbf{u}t}\mathbf{u}_{t}+f_{ct},\mathbf{F}_{t}). The parameters of the normal-inverse-Wishart prior are obtained from the global model of the dynamics which, as described previously, is fitted to all available tuples {𝐱ti,𝐮ti,𝐱t+1i}superscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡𝑖superscriptsubscript𝐮𝑡𝑖superscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡1𝑖\{\mathbf{x}_{t}^{i},\mathbf{u}_{t}^{i},\mathbf{x}_{t+1}^{i}\}.
items.zh: 获得 Σ 和 μ 后，我们可以通过对分布 N(μ,Σ) 在 [xt;ut] 上取条件来获得动力学 p(xt+1|xt,ut) 的估计，这产生线性高斯动力学 p(xt+1|xt,ut)=N(fxt xt + fut ut + fct, Ft)。正态逆威沙特先验的参数从全局动力学模型获得，如前所述，该模型拟合到所有可用的元组 {xti, uti, xt+1i}。

items.en: The simplest prior can be obtained by fitting a Gaussian distribution to vectors [𝐱;𝐮;𝐱′]𝐱𝐮superscript𝐱′[\mathbf{x};\mathbf{u};\mathbf{x}^{\prime}]. If the mean and covariance of this data are given by μ¯¯𝜇\bar{\mu} and Σ¯¯Σ\bar{\Sigma}, the prior is given by 𝚽=n0​Σ¯𝚽subscript𝑛0¯Σ\mathbf{\Phi}=n_{0}\bar{\Sigma} and μ0=μ¯subscript𝜇0¯𝜇\mu_{0}=\bar{\mu}, while n0subscript𝑛0n_{0} and m𝑚m should be set to the number of data points in the datasets. In practice, settings n0subscript𝑛0n_{0} and m𝑚m to 111 tends to produce better results, since the prior is fitted to many more samples than are available for linear regression at each time step. While this prior is simple, we can obtain a better prior by employing a nonlinear model.
items.zh: 最简单的先验可以通过对向量 [x;u;x'] 拟合高斯分布获得。如果这些数据的均值和协方差由 μ̄ 和 Σ̄ 给出，则先验由 Φ=n0 Σ̄ 和 μ0=μ̄ 给出，而 n0 和 m 应设置为数据集中的数据点数。在实践中，将 n0 和 m 设置为 1 往往会产生更好的结果，因为先验拟合的样本数远多于每个时间步线性回归可用的样本数。虽然这个先验很简单，但我们可以通过使用非线性模型获得更好的先验。

items.en: The particular global model we use in this work is a Gaussian mixture model over vectors [𝐱;𝐮;𝐱′]𝐱𝐮superscript𝐱′[\mathbf{x};\mathbf{u};\mathbf{x}^{\prime}]. Systems of articulated rigid bodies undergoing contact dynamics, such as robots interacting with their environment, can be coarsely modeled as having piecewise linear dynamics. The Gaussian mixture model provides a good approximation for such piecewise linear systems, with each mixture element corresponding to a different linear mode (Khansari-Zadeh and Billard, 2010). Under this model, the state transition tuple is assumed to come from a distribution that depends on some hidden state hℎh, which corresponds to the mixture element identity. In practice, this hidden state might correspond to the type of contact profile experienced by a robotic arm at step i𝑖i. The prior for the dynamics fit at time step t𝑡t is then obtained by inferring the hidden state distribution for the transition dataset {𝐱ti,𝐮ti,𝐱t+1i}superscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡𝑖superscriptsubscript𝐮𝑡𝑖superscriptsubscript𝐱𝑡1𝑖\{\mathbf{x}_{t}^{i},\mathbf{u}_{t}^{i},\mathbf{x}_{t+1}^{i}\}, and using the mean and covariance of the corresponding mixture elements (weighted by their probabilities) to obtain μ¯¯𝜇\bar{\mu} and Σ¯¯Σ\bar{\Sigma}. The prior parameters can then be obtained as described above.
items.zh: 我们在本工作中使用的特定全局模型是向量 [x;u;x'] 上的高斯混合模型。经历接触动力学的铰接刚体系统，例如与其环境交互的机器人，可以粗略地建模为具有分段线性动力学。高斯混合模型为这种分段线性系统提供了良好的近似，每个混合元素对应不同的线性模式（Khansari-Zadeh 和 Billard, 2010）。在该模型下，状态转移元组被认为来自依赖于某个隐藏状态 h 的分布，该隐藏状态对应于混合元素身份。在实践中，这个隐藏状态可能对应于机器人手臂在步骤 i 经历的接触轮廓类型。然后，通过推断转移数据集 {xti, uti, xt+1i} 的隐藏状态分布，并使用相应混合元素（按其概率加权）的均值和协方差来获得 μ̄ 和 Σ̄，从而获得时间步 t 动力学拟合的先验。然后可以如上所述获得先验参数。

items.en: In our experiments, we set the number of mixture elements for the Gaussian mixture model prior such that there were at least 40 samples per mixture element, or 20 total mixture elements, whichever was lower. In general, we did not find the performance of the method to be sensitive to this parameter, though overfitting did tend to occur in the early iterations when the number of samples is low, if the number of mixtures was too high.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，我们设置高斯混合模型先验的混合元素数量，使得每个混合元素至少有 40 个样本，或总共 20 个混合元素，取较低者。总的来说，我们发现方法的性能对该参数不敏感，尽管当样本数量较少时，如果混合数量过高，早期迭代中确实容易发生过拟合。

items.en: In this appendix, we present a detailed summary of the experimental setup for our simulated and real-world experiments.
items.zh: 在本附录中，我们详细总结了模拟和真实世界实验的实验设置。

items.en: All of the simulated experiments used the MuJoCo simulation package (Todorov et al., 2012), with simulated frictional contacts and torque motors at the joints used for actuation. Although no control or state noise was added during simulation, noise was injected naturally by the linear-Gaussian controllers. The linear-Gaussian controllers pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) were initialized to stay near the initial state 𝐱1subscript𝐱1\mathbf{x}_{1} using linear feedback based on a proportional-derivative control law for all tasks, except for the octopus arm, where pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) was initialized to be zero mean with a fixed spherical covariance, and the walker, which was initialized to track a demonstration trajectory with proportional-derivative feedback. The walker was the only task that used a demonstration, as described previously. We describe the details of each system below.
items.zh: 所有模拟实验均使用 MuJoCo 模拟包 (Todorov et al., 2012)，模拟了摩擦接触和关节处的扭矩电机用于驱动。尽管模拟中没有添加控制或状态噪声，但线性高斯控制器自然引入了噪声。线性高斯控制器 p_i(𝐮_t|𝐱_t) 初始化为通过基于比例-微分控制律的线性反馈保持在初始状态 𝐱_1 附近，但章鱼臂除外，其中 p_i(𝐮_t|𝐱_t) 初始化为零均值且具有固定的球形协方差，而步行器则初始化为通过比例-微分反馈跟踪演示轨迹。如前所述，步行器是唯一使用演示的任务。下面我们描述每个系统的细节。

items.en: The 2D peg insertion task has 6 state dimensions (joint angles and angular velocities) and 2 action dimensions. The 3D version of the task has 12 state dimensions, since the arm has 3 degrees of freedom at the shoulder, 1 at the elbow, and 2 at the wrist. Trials were 8 seconds in length and simulated at 100 Hz, resulting in 800 time steps per rollout. The cost function is given by
items.zh: 2D 插销插入任务有 6 个状态维度（关节角度和角速度）和 2 个动作维度。3D 版本的任务有 12 个状态维度，因为手臂在肩部有 3 个自由度，肘部有 1 个，腕部有 2 个。试验持续 8 秒，以 100 Hz 模拟，每次 rollout 有 800 个时间步。成本函数由下式给出：

We use this norm to encourage the peg to precisely reach the target position at the bottom of the hole, but to also receive a larger penalty when far away. The task also works well in 2D with a simple ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} penalty, though we found that the 3D version of the task takes longer to insert the peg all the way into the hole without the ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1}-like square root term. The weights were set to w𝐮=10−6subscript𝑤𝐮superscript106w_{\mathbf{u}}=10^{-6} and w𝐩=1subscript𝑤𝐩1w_{\mathbf{p}}=1. Initial states were chosen by moving the shoulder of the arm relative to the hole, with four equally spaced starting states in a 20 cm region for the 2D arm, and four random starting states in a 10 cm radius for the 3D arm.
items.zh: 其中 𝐩_{𝐱_t} 是状态 𝐱_t 下末端执行器的位置，𝐩^⋆ 是插槽底部的期望末端执行器位置，范数 ℓ_{12}(z) 由 ½‖z‖² + √(α+z²) 给出，对应于 ℓ₂ 范数和软 ℓ₁ 范数之和。我们使用此范数来鼓励插销精确到达孔底的目标位置，同时在远离时受到更大的惩罚。该任务在 2D 中使用简单的 ℓ₂ 惩罚也能很好地工作，但我们发现 3D 版本的任务如果没有类似 ℓ₁ 的平方根项，则需要更长时间才能将插销完全插入孔中。权重设置为 w_𝐮 = 10⁻⁶ 和 w_𝐩 = 1。初始状态通过相对于孔移动手臂的肩部来选择，2D 手臂在 20 cm 区域内有四个等间距的起始状态，3D 手臂在 10 cm 半径内有四个随机起始状态。

items.en: The octopus arm consists of six four-sided chambers. Each edge of each chamber is a simulated muscle, and actions correspond to contracting or relaxing the muscle. The state space consists of the positions and velocities of the chamber vertices. The midpoint of one edge of the first chamber is fixed, resulting in a total of 252525 degrees of freedom: the 2D positions of the 121212 unconstrained points, and the orientation of the first edge. Including velocities, the total dimensionality of the state space is 505050. The cost function depends on the activation of the muscles and distance between the tip of the arm and the target point, in the same way as for peg insertion. The weights are set to w𝐮=10−3subscript𝑤𝐮superscript103w_{\mathbf{u}}=10^{-3} and w𝐩=1subscript𝑤𝐩1w_{\mathbf{p}}=1.
items.zh: 章鱼臂由六个四面腔室组成。每个腔室的每条边都是一块模拟肌肉，动作对应于收缩或放松肌肉。状态空间由腔室顶点的位置和速度组成。第一个腔室的一条边的中点固定，导致总共 25 个自由度：12 个无约束点的 2D 位置，以及第一条边的方向。包括速度在内，状态空间的总维度为 50。成本函数取决于肌肉的激活和手臂尖端与目标点之间的距离，与插销插入任务相同。权重设置为 w_𝐮 = 10⁻³ 和 w_𝐩 = 1。

items.en: The swimmer consists of 3 links and 5 degrees of freedom, including the global position and orientation which, together with the velocities, produces a 10 dimensional state space. The swimmer has 2 action dimensions corresponding to the torques between joints. The simulation applied drag on each link of the swimmer to roughly simulate a fluid, allowing it to propel itself. The rollouts were 20 seconds in length at 20 Hz, resulting in 400 time steps per rollout. The cost function for the swimmer is given by

items.en: All of the robotic experiments were conducted on a PR2 robot. The robot was controlled at 20 Hz via direct effort control,555The PR2 robot does not provide for closed loop torque control, but instead supports an effort control interface that directly sets feedforward motor voltages. In practice, these voltages are roughly proportional to feedforward torques, but are also affected by friction and damping. and camera images were recorded using the RGB camera on a PrimeSense Carmine sensor. The images were downsampled to 240×240×32402403240\times 240\times 3. The learned policies controlled one 7 DoF arm of the robot, while the other arm was used to move objects in the scene to automatically vary the initial conditions. The camera was kept fixed in each experiment. Each episode was 555 seconds in length. For each task, the cost function required placing the object held in the gripper at a particular location (which might require, for example, to insert a shape into a shape sorting cube). The cost was given by the following equation:
items.zh: 所有机器人实验均在 PR2 机器人上进行。机器人通过直接力控制以 20 Hz 的频率进行控制，⁵⁵ 并使用 PrimeSense Carmine 传感器的 RGB 相机记录相机图像。图像下采样至 240×240×3。学习到的策略控制机器人的一个 7 自由度手臂，而另一只手臂用于移动场景中的物体以自动改变初始条件。每个实验中相机保持固定。每个 episode 持续 5 秒。对于每个任务，成本函数要求将夹爪中抓取的物体放置在特定位置（例如，将形状插入形状分类立方体中）。成本由以下方程给出：

items.en: where dtsubscript𝑑𝑡d_{t} is the distance between three points in the space of the end-effector and their target positions,666Three points fully define the pose of the end-effector. For the bottle cap task, which is radially symmetric, we use only two points., and the weights are set to wℓ2=10−3subscript𝑤subscriptℓ2superscript103w_{\ell_{2}}=10^{-3}, wlog=1.0subscript𝑤1.0w_{\log}=1.0, and w𝐮=10−2subscript𝑤𝐮superscript102w_{\mathbf{u}}=10^{-2}. The quadratic term encourages moving the end-effector toward the target when it is far, while the logarithm term encourages placing it precisely at the target location, as discussed in prior work (Levine et al., 2015). The bottle cap task used an additional cost term consisting of a quadratic penalty on the difference between the wrist angular velocity and a target velocity.
items.zh: 其中 d_t 是末端执行器空间中三个点与其目标位置之间的距离，⁶⁶ 权重设置为 w_{ℓ₂} = 10⁻³，w_{log} = 1.0，w_𝐮 = 10⁻²。二次项鼓励在末端执行器远离目标时将其移向目标，而对数项则鼓励将其精确放置在目标位置，如先前工作所述 (Levine et al., 2015)。瓶盖任务使用了一个额外的成本项，即腕部角速度与目标速度之差的二次惩罚。

items.en: For all of the tasks, we initialized all of the linear-Gaussian controllers pi​(𝐮t|𝐱t)subscript𝑝𝑖conditionalsubscript𝐮𝑡subscript𝐱𝑡p_{i}(\mathbf{u}_{t}|\mathbf{x}_{t}) to stay near the initial state 𝐱1subscript𝐱1\mathbf{x}_{1}, with a diagonal noise covariance. The covariance of the noise was chosen to be proportional to a diagonal approximation of the inverse effective mass at each joint, as provided by the manufacturer of the PR2 robot, and the feedback controller was constructed using LQR, with an approximate linear model obtained from the same diagonal inverse mass matrix. The role of this initial controller was primarily to avoid dangerous actions during the first iteration. We discuss the particular setup for each experiment below:
items.zh: 对于所有任务，我们将所有线性高斯控制器 p_i(𝐮_t|𝐱_t) 初始化为保持在初始状态 𝐱_1 附近，并具有对角噪声协方差。噪声协方差选择为与 PR2 机器人制造商提供的每个关节的逆有效质量的对角近似成比例，反馈控制器使用 LQR 构建，并使用来自同一对角逆质量矩阵的近似线性模型。该初始控制器的作用主要是避免第一次迭代中的危险动作。下面我们讨论每个实验的具体设置：

items.en: The coat hanger task required the robot to hang a coat hanger on a clothes rack. The coat hanger was grasped at one of two angles, about 35∘superscript3535^{\circ} apart, and the rack was positioned at three different distances from the robot during training, with differences of about 10​ cm10 cm10\text{ cm} between each position. The rack was moved manually between these positions during training. A trial was considered successful if, when the coat hanger was released, it remained hanging on the rack rather than dropping to the ground.
items.zh: 衣架任务要求机器人将衣架挂在衣架上。衣架以两个角度之一抓取，相差约 35°，训练期间衣架位于距离机器人三个不同距离的位置，每个位置相差约 10 cm。训练期间手动移动衣架在这些位置之间。如果释放衣架后它仍然挂在衣架上而不是掉到地上，则认为试验成功。

items.en: The shape sorting cube task required the robot to insert a red trapezoid into a trapezoidal hole on a shape sorting cube. During training, the cube was positioned at nine different positions, situated at the corners, edges, and middle of a rectangular region 16​ cm×10​ cm16 cm10 cm16\text{ cm}\times 10\text{ cm} in size. During training, the shape sorting cube was moved through the training positions by using the left arm. A trial was considered successful if the bottom face of the trapezoid was completely inside the shape sorting cube, such that if the robot were to release the trapezoid, it would fall inside the cube.
items.zh: 形状分类立方体任务要求机器人将红色梯形插入形状分类立方体上的梯形孔中。训练期间，立方体位于九个不同位置，位于大小为 16 cm × 10 cm 的矩形区域的角、边和中心。训练期间，通过使用左臂移动形状分类立方体经过训练位置。如果梯形的底面完全在形状分类立方体内部，使得如果机器人释放梯形，它会掉入立方体内部，则认为试验成功。

items.en: The hammer task required the robot to insert the claw of a toy hammer underneath a toy plastic nail, placing the claw around the base of the nail. The hammer was grasped at one of three angles, each 22.5∘superscript22.522.5^{\circ} apart, for a total variation of 45∘superscript4545^{\circ} degrees, and the nail was positioned at five positions, at the corners and center of a rectangular region 10​ cm×7​ cm10 cm7 cm10\text{ cm}\times 7\text{ cm} in size. During training, the toy tool bench containing the nail was moved using the left arm. A trial was considered successful if the tip of the claw of the hammer was at least under the centerline of the nail.
items.zh: 锤子任务要求机器人将玩具锤的爪部插入玩具塑料钉下方，将爪部放在钉子的基部周围。锤子以三个角度之一抓取，每个角度相差 22.5°，总变化为 45°，钉子位于五个位置，位于大小为 10 cm × 7 cm 的矩形区域的角和中心。训练期间，使用左臂移动包含钉子的玩具工具台。如果锤子爪部的尖端至少位于钉子的中心线下方，则认为试验成功。

items.en: The bottle cap task required the robot to screw a cap onto a bottle at various positions. The bottle was located at nine different positions, situated at the corners, edges, and middle of a rectangular region 16​ cm×10​ cm16 cm10 cm16\text{ cm}\times 10\text{ cm} in size, and the left arm was used to move the bottle through the training positions. A trial was considered successful if, after completion, the cap could not be removed from bottle simply by pulling vertically.
items.zh: 瓶盖任务要求机器人将瓶盖拧到不同位置的瓶子上。瓶子位于九个不同位置，位于大小为 16 cm × 10 cm 的矩形区域的角、边和中心，使用左臂将瓶子移动到训练位置。如果完成后仅通过垂直拉动无法将瓶盖从瓶子上取下，则认为试验成功。
